channel.display-name: Weird or What? With William Shatner
The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch
A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: A priest from the Vatican is sent to visit a woman who's showing signs of stigmata. The priest comes to find that the lady is truly possessed by something.

programme.title: Mirrors
programme.desc: From the director of The Hills Have Eyes comes the terrifying story of troubled ex-cop who must save his family from an unspeakable evil that is using mirrors as a gateway into their home.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Cybermutt
programme.desc: The powerful dog Rex is injured by a car while rescuing a young scientist from being run over. Feeling responsible for the condition of Rex the scientist uses his skill as a prosthetics inventor to give the dog a new, super-power body.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks
programme.desc: To his family and friends, Cody Banks is a typical teen. But Cody has a secret - he's actually part of an undercover teen CIA program and has 5 years of special training under his belt.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks 2: Destination London
programme.desc: Traveling to London, Agent Cody Banks attends a prestigious school where he gets close to a man who is working with his arch villain Molay.

programme.title: Of Mice and Men
programme.desc: John Malkovich, Gary Sinise and Sherilyn Fenn shine in this contemporary remake of the beloved classic about a nomadic farm worker who looks after his dimwitted, gentle-giant friend.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Bogus Journey
programme.desc: In this sequel to BILL & TED'S EXCELLENT ADVENTURE, the dimwitted duo travel to Heaven, Hell and points in between as they meet (among others) Albert Einstein, the Easter Bunny and the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: In her Academy Award winning role, Cher, while waiting for her timid fiance to decide between her and his mother, falls in love with her fiance's estranged brother, a bakery worker with a love of opera and life.

programme.title: Samson vs. The Vampire Women
programme.desc: While Mike and the Bots wrestle with Samson vs. the Vampire Women, TV's Frank is assumed into Second Banana Heaven.

programme.title: The Beast of Yucca Flats
programme.desc: After a devastating atomic test, Joseph Javorsky, a defecting Russian scientist, is transformed into a murderous radioactive beast.

programme.title: Lost Continent
programme.desc: A military team sent to search for a lost rocket ends up trapped on a mountain inhabited by dinosaurs in Lost Continent.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts: Chicken of Tomorrow
programme.desc: We learn what is being done "today" to create the Chicken of Tomorrow (complete with the growth process of the chicken), with a side mention of how important gas stations and oil are to the poultry industry.

programme.title: A Case of Spring Fever
programme.desc: An animated pixie named Coily grants a man his wish that all springs disappear...a wish that he soon regrets.

programme.title: Rocket Attack U.S.A.
programme.desc: Rocket Attack U.S.A.: The crew watches the second chapter of The Phantom Creeps and a film about an American spy sent to the Soviet Union to investigate a missile attack.

programme.title: Blood Waters of Dr. Z
programme.desc: Seeking revenge against those responsible for stripping him of his tenure and the denial of human research subjects, Dr. Z mutates himself into a hideous — and murderous — half-human-half-fish-like creature!

programme.title: Red Zone Cuba
programme.desc: An escaped convict and his two pals take part in the Bay of Pigs invasion, then return home with a plan to get rich.

programme.title: Swamp Diamonds
programme.desc: An undercover police woman infiltrates a group of hardened female criminals who plan to break out of prison and retrieve diamonds from a swamp.

programme.title: The Rebel Set
programme.desc: Three coffee shop customers help an owner rob an armored car.

programme.title: The Brute Man
programme.desc: Rondo Hatton plays a disfigured man, a/k/a “The Creeper,” who hunts down and kills the people responsible for his deformity.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The kids find themselves in Paradwyn, and reunite with another familiar face: Myrv, the Paradwynian scout. But they are shocked to discover that Myrv is able to magine a Hyren…and is able to keep it magined - something that they are unable to do.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: A Weave Emissary named Iyori is being pursued by Core Drushes. As she gets closer to Vash Naroom, Edyn, Tony, and Strag come to her aid and defeat the attacking creatures.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: When Master Mayhem tries to upload a cool new viral video, he totally #fails, and now everybody on planet Earth is laughing at him! So he’s sending Teensy the Tri-Terror-Tops to pulverize our planet, and delete the internet.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Scare-A-Normal-Activity / Beast Feast
programme.desc: McGee vows to protect Lakebottom's secrets from the prying host of 'Paranormal Confronter.'

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony, Edyn and Strag are ambushed in the Bograth swamp by their old Shadow Magi enemy Chur. After a heated battle, Chur gets his hands on the Book of Elders and incinerates it with a fireball before leaving in satisfaction.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bird Brains / The Real Vincent
programme.desc: Squirt is eager to assist his idol, Dr. Sapstein on his latest quest for the rare mocker bird.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity
programme.desc: The campers track down a UFO inhabited by an alien from the planet Squipiter.
programme.sub-title: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor needs a brain to complete his latest creation, Frankendino. But the only brain that’s good enough is Edgar’s, so Skor hands Skrap a serrated brain spoon and sends him off to fetch it.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: When the Final Hyren quest lands the kids in Bograth, they discover the strange, swamp-laden realm. The rampant void energy poisoning the swamp has changed the Bograthians - and their Guardian Hyren - into mutated, rat-like creatures.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: The A-R-C is in Hawaii for a race through a series of dormant volcanoes.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: While in Vash Naroom, the kids discover that Gorgram has offered a challenge to his Shadow Magi: whoever gets Orwin's Staff, becomes his second-in-command! Edyn has to use her knowledge of her realm to defeat the eager Shadow Magi.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor decides that if he can’t beat the Kung Fu Dino Posse, he might as well make fools of them – literally. Thanks to an unstable new cloning device, Skor makes clones of all four Dinos – and turns them into clowns.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: The opening day race for the new A-R-C racing season is threatened when the villainous Black Cloud - under the leadership of General Raven - kidnaps Maggie Strong, daughter of league chairman George Strong.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Hiccups / Boogeyman Fever
programme.desc: Things start disappearing around Lakebottom!

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Master Mayhem has decided to come to Earth and destroy the planet himself! But after a teleporter malfunction reduces him to human size, he’s having trouble overlording over anybody.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Last Days / Knock on Wood
programme.desc: McGee tries to save Camp Lakebottom from being overtaken by the Grim Camper.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Jet is suffering from terrible W.O. – Wing Odor – and it’s making all the other Posse members nuts. No matter how much under-wing deodorant he uses, he still stinks.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: In the ruins of a Naroomi Arena in the forest, Orwin runs Tony, Edyn and Strag through a battle drill with their Dream Creatures. A massive Shadow Geyser erupts nearby, spewing powerful Void Energy into the sky, and sucking Edyn towards it.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: It’s Master Mayhem’s birthday! But what do you get for the galactic overlord who has everything? TOTAL CONTROL OVER THE EARTH! Now Dome Diddy Dome is coming to crush us all, and make Master Mayhem’s birthday wish come true.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Fright Club / Bottomdome
programme.desc: The campers discover an enchanted flashlight.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Kane is in the midst of teaching the posse a bit about their proud dino roots when Lucy rushes in with exciting news… The Queen is coming to visit Megalopolis! !! Lucy drags the posse boys to join the crowds and watch the Queen’s motorcade pass by.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: In Naroom's Arena Ruins, Tony, Edyn and Strag are running battle drills in an attempt to master their still-raw Final Dreamer powers... when Furok begins to act strangely.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The Final Dreamers are flabbergasted when they are approached by Gorgram, who urges them to stop Korg and Zed from taking control of a doomsday weapon called the Gear, which would destroy half the Moonlands.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Master Mayhem is packing for a little vacation! He found a super cheap hotel, and while he’s away, the Earth will pay! He’s sending Macho Cheese to crumble Earth’s Champion and cover our planet in cheese… and cheesy jokes!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: With both the Moonlands Diamond and Orwin's staff in their hands, the Final Dreamers still can't figure out how to merge them into the Realm's Honor staff, the relic used to magine the Final Hyren.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: In the fantastical world of the Moonlands, a pair of heroic Magi, Aidan and Elle, battle Agram, a villainous Shadow Magi. Utilizing the Dreamstones in the cover of the Book of Elders, they form the Core Glyph, a magical entrapment that locks Agram away.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The kids stumble upon an ancient secret when their quest leads them to the Volcanic realm of Cald. Buried beneath rivers of lava, is the relic-forger, a tool used to create any relic…just by thinking of it!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: After playing the “home version” of one of his favorite competitive eating shows, Chow receives a phone call naming him winner of a cruise for him and all his friends. Edgar will be staying home.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run
programme.desc: Buttsquat's Teddy Bear washes up at Camp Lakebottom and hypnotizes the Bottom Dwellers.
programme.sub-title: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Red Drawn / Pandora's Jock
programme.desc: A travelling salesman visits Lakebottom one boring rainy day and sells McGee a magic pencil.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: While Johnny and his friend Doug are on a practice run over the Pacific, Doug suddenly disappears in a flash of light. The Metajets discover this isn’t the first time jets have disappeared in the area, and head back to investigate.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Edgar and the Dino Posse are looking for a gem in the city when they pass a nursery/gardening center. Edgar always wants to impress Polly, and Lucy suggests he buy her some flowers.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Master Mayhem takes us behind the scenes to show how all that Mayhem gets made! But he accidentally reveals a bit too much, and once the galaxy has seen MM’s cute little “Dream Board” his only solution is to have RoBro destroy us all.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: While travelling through Naroom, the Final Dreamers stumble upon a tiny medieval village…that has somehow been transported from Earth to the Moonlands! They befriend and help Tony's ancestor, Sir Anthony, defeat the mysterious Black Knight.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!
programme.sub-title: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: When Master Mayhem orders a new monster-by-mail, it escapes and runs wild in his Space Condo! While trying to catch this adorable killing machine, MM sends the master of cheesy mayhem, Macho Cheese, down to destroy Planet Earth.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths
programme.desc: When Squirt's stinky underwear is washed in toxic cleanser, the gitch comes alive.
programme.sub-title: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: The team arrives in Antarctica for a benefit race, to help fund important research on a weather patterning system - a device capable of changing the weather, to help battle global warming.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Marshmallow Madness / 28 Suzi's Later
programme.desc: Armand goes into a feeding frenzy when wild marshmallows give the campers a rash.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Episode 1
programme.desc: Karen is welcomed back to Staten Island after 10 long years of exile in Arizona, though loyal mafia daughter Renee is outraged by her presence at Carla's birthday party.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Episode 2
programme.desc: Carla wants peace between her friends after the big fight, Renee vents to her therapist about her ex-husband's unreliability, and Drita is sick of waiting for Lee to come home for good.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Episode 3
programme.desc: Drita worries about her daughters, Karen revisits her past as she begins work on her book, and Renee finds comfort with an unlikely source when Junior is swept up in a mass mob bust.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Episode 4
programme.desc: Carla struggles with single motherhood, Renee hosts a psychic party and decides to bury the hatchet with Drita, and a confrontation at a bar threatens Junior's temporary freedom

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 15
programme.desc: Love is in the air as Glen rids Riley of her Valentine's issues, Jay fixes Leon's bedroom problems, Alice works on Suzanne's cocky Cupid, and Sketch divorces Jordan from his tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 1
programme.desc: The team tackle Sam's embarrassing tattoo, which has earned him a serious ultimatum, deal with holiday ink that Ryan doesn't remember getting, and rid Adam of a lasting reminder of his ex.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 3
programme.desc: Glamour model Bex wants to put her Jedward tattoo behind her, and Andy has an inspirational tattoo story. Annie hopes to fix a tattoo that, after a mid-inking disagreement, didn't turn out as planned.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 4
programme.desc: Michael needs help with a holiday tattoo that's writing cheques his anatomy can't cash. Superfan Emma wants to commit to ink her love for Cheryl Fernandez-Versini. A fire-eater lights up Jay's eyes.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 5
programme.desc: Lou helps tomboy Lucy, who has a vulgar phrase tattooed on her leg. Skater boy Matt shows Sketch a tattoo in an unsightly place. Jay assists Amina, who thinks getting inked is worse than giving birth.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch meets Gaz, who has his best friend's initials in an intimate place, and the whole team are shocked by the cover-up he wants. Jay gives Lady Gaga superfan Harry the portrait of his dreams.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 7
programme.desc: Jay deals with a couple who are obsessed with going on holiday and getting cheap tattoos. Lou is busy sorting out Thom, who has arrived with a rude tribute to one of his friends on his rear end.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 8
programme.desc: Victoria is in desperate need of a tattoo cover-up so she can train as a teacher. Abigail gets inked at the age of 75, Hollie loses her cheeky chicken ink, and Lisa divorces a big tattoo mistake.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 1
programme.desc: Vicky celebrates her family with an animal tribute tattoo, Abby's cringe-worthy celebrity crush is covered, Jordan needs to lose the ink he got to win an argument, and Adam has a rather personal tatt.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 2
programme.desc: Respectable dad Stephen aims to see the back of a crude tattoo he had 20 years ago. Tattoo-mad ex-solider Rob's phallic self-portrait is a step too far, and Leeanneah has lyrics tattooed on her chest.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 3
programme.desc: House fire survivor Steve has his scarring covered with a Celtic knot design, Amy swaps an embarrassing marriage proposal for a tribute to her favourite dinosaur, and Sam's X-rated nickname is hidden.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 4
programme.desc: The team help Georgie, who had such a wild time with the boys on holiday she commemorated the trip with a tattoo that's left her single ever since. Alice takes on Kelly's animation-inspired disaster.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 5
programme.desc: Sketch covers a shoddy Egyptian-themed tattoo for Ste, Dave is dragged to the studio by his children, who can't bear his obscene back-piece any longer, and Kara needs to lose an inappropriate emoji.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 6
programme.desc: Jay covers paramedic Anthony's tattoo, which is putting the frighteners on his patients. Alice disguises Sonny's unwanted present from his mates. Sketch tackles Alex's drunken DIY teddy bear design.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers (daytime): Episode 7
programme.desc: Drag queen Devon feels snared by his barbed-wire tattoo because it's a painful reminder of an ex. Alice welcomes Halloween-loving Chippy, whose portrait of her daughter is more than a little spooky.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 11
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can an airplane toilet create enough suction to cause a person to become stuck on it? Can a can of biscuit dough explode in a hot car?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 221
programme.desc: Can a gun fire lethally if its barrel is bent? Can tape measures and wallets stop bullets? Will a shotgun shell on the tip of a wooden spear detonate if jabbed into an attacking animal?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 218
programme.desc: Can two men carrying a pane of glass survive unscathed if a car smashes through it? Can a rocket-propelled grenade explosion flip an SUV?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 229
programme.desc: Could someone shoot a live grenade in mid-air, thus rendering it useless? Can you contain a TNT explosion inside an ordinary object?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 219
programme.desc: Can a ping pong ball inflict a lethal injury if it flies fast enough? Can a cannon and cannonballs made from ice be a reliable weapon?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 183
programme.desc: Can excavators row a barge, take you wakeboarding or do acrobatics? Can you patch the fuselage of a plane with duct tape?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 47
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a deadly crossbow be made from materials available to prison inmates? Can vodka remove the smell of cigarettes from clothes or kill bees like an insecticide?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 214
programme.desc: Is a bathroom's hand dryer better than a paper towel? Which public restroom stall is the cleanest? Is it better to stand in the doorway during an earthquake?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 90
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can someone's hat be shot off? Is it possible to break someone out of jail with horses? Can an airbag turn a lock-pick into a lethal spear?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 134
programme.desc: Is it possible to lift a car using nothing but duct tape? Can duct tape plug holes in the bottom of boats? Can you create a working sail-boat out of duct tape?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 220
programme.desc: Can you herd cats? Can you catch a greased pig? Can you stuff 10 pounds of feces into a 5-pound bag?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 58
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a laser alarm be defeated? Can a metal duct be stealthily climbed using magnets? Can a pressure switch be defeated? How easy is it to crack a safe?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 32
programme.desc: Myths tested: What is the fastest way to cool a case of beer? Was a battery able to be used for certain tasks in ancient times?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 197
programme.desc: Can you jump to safety from a collapsing rope bridge as seen in the film "Cliffhanger"? Can a strong enough hailstorm sink a boat?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 54
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can mind control be achieved? Can a room be painted with dynamite?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 189
programme.desc: Can a vehicle run as well on square wheels as it does on round ones? Can two cars stuck nose to nose really do the maneuvers shown in the film "Date Night?"

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 14
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a marching battalion take down a bridge? How many bacteria reside on a toothbrush? Is it possible to water ski behind a rowing eight?

programme.title: The Birdcage
programme.desc: Robin Williams, Gene Hackman, Nathan Lane and Dianne Wiest lead the laughs in this wild Comedy that insists you don't have to be a woman to be a mother.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back in Business
programme.desc: The Barbershop is threatened by the arrival of a hip, well-financed chain barbershop that's about to open next door.

programme.title: Empire Records
programme.desc: A group of young, anti-establishment Gen-X employees fight to save their record store from being overtaken by a conglomerate retail record corporation.

programme.title: Simply Irresistible
programme.desc: Magic and laughter are the main ingredients in this SIMPLY IRRESISTIBLE love story of a restaurant owner/chef and a department store executive who seem to have nothing in common.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he's white.

programme.title: Then Came You
programme.desc: A lonely widow plans a trip around the world with her husband's ashes, to visit the places they loved in the movies. The first stop on the journey changes her life forever.

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: Calvin, who inherited a struggling barbershop, views the shop as nothing but a burden and waste of his time. After selling the shop to a local loan shark, Calvin slowly begins to see his father's vision and legacy .

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn
programme.desc: Sean heads to Wigan to investigate a location with history dating back to 900AD. Encountering a spirit that attacks him, will the team be safe tonight as they come face to face with pure evil?
programme.sub-title: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Buried under the location Sean investigates tonight, is the bones of the deceased and it appears that they are at unrest. Will Sean solve the mystery of who is haunting this location?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Not a Very Fun Day at The Beech Caves
programme.desc: Witchcraft, demons and ghosts have all been reported to haunt these caves. Sean investigates this network of tunnels deep underground and uncovers that all is not as it seems. This is not a day out at the seaside at Beech Caves.
programme.sub-title: Not a Very Fun Day at The Beech Caves

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads deep into the Pendle Hills in search of the Pendle Witches that went to trial in 1612 and were hung for witchcraft. The investigation takes an unexpected twist with a stop at the New Inn, Pendles most haunted pub.
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Pendle Hill and ventures even deeper into the hills. The night takes an unexpected turn with a dramatic ending, which he believes was caused by the witches.
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to the town of Morley to investigate the infamous Morley Market. A place once bustling with people from years gone by, it is now haunted by shadow figures, and they appear to want to make themselves known.
programme.sub-title: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues the investigation at Morley Market and appears to be followed by a spirit person that wants to touch him and distract him from investigating certain parts of the main hall. Will he uncover who this spirit is?
programme.sub-title: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean returns to his former, haunted home. No tenant has ever been able to stay the full term. Sean wants to seek out the spirits once and for all, to finally find out what is haunting his former home.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Sandhole Cottage and appears to be in direct contact with the spirits that haunted any tenants that came to live there. Will he finally get them to rest?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Opening The Book at Leeds Library - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean delves deep and opens a new chapter for the Ghost Dimension Flying Solo series as he investigates Leeds Library, to uncover what is haunting and frightening the staff that work here.
programme.sub-title: Opening The Book at Leeds Library - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Closing The Book at Leeds Library - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Leeds Library and attempts to communicate with a spirit known by the name of Sternberg. Will his investigation have a happy ending?
programme.sub-title: Closing The Book at Leeds Library - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Altrincham, Greater Manchester to investigate The Old Market Tavern. Once used as a coaching inn and a court house, many spirits still lurk here and Sean captures one of the most clearest EVP's ever.
programme.sub-title: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his paranormal investigation at The Old Market Tavern and he appears to have attracted the attention of spirit that launches a physical attack on him. Will he survive the night?
programme.sub-title: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Sean heads to Astley Green to the infamous Astley Green Colliery Museum. So many reports of paranormal activity have been confirmed at the mine, from lost miners to tormented souls.
programme.sub-title: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation into Astley Green Colliery Museum and attempts to make further contact with the souls and spirits who have lost their lives there. Will he succeed?
programme.sub-title: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Oswestry to investigate claims of hauntings at a castle thousands of years old, and believed to be haunted by an angry judge. Will any of the souls that departed here come out to play?
programme.sub-title: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the castle and attempts to make contact with the spirit world. It appears he is not alone.
programme.sub-title: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: 14 Ghosts of The Bate Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to Macclesfield, Cheshire to investigate a building said to be haunted by 14 ghosts and also the lost soul of a witch. With so many spirits in one of the oldest public houses in the UK, will any of the ghosts join him tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Middleton, Manchester to investigate claims that a sad cavalier named Edward is haunting this location. Ring O Bells has also been used for druid rituals. Will he be able to summon any spirits tonight?
programme.sub-title: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 1

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: While in India, VENOM lures a cobra from a snake charmer.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Brad Turner is faced with a stiff challenge, a new and deadly virus threatens the world, and the only known cure is derived from a plant indigenous to an unfriendly African nation.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: The Pink The Bad And The Ugly
programme.desc: Sheriff Pink and Hoarse must rescue the town's money from Bandit Big Nose and his gang.
programme.sub-title: The Pink The Bad And The Ugly

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: In 'Big Top Pinky,' Pinky dreams of stardom in the circus and discovers his calling is as a clown. And in 'Yeti 'nother Bigfoot Story,' custodian Pinky, after running a museum display, travels to Alaska in search of Bigfoot.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pink Rider': Pinky starts a delivery service and is menaced by a motorcycle gang and a monster truck company. 'The Midnight Ride of Pink Revere': When Paul Revere is conked on the head by a horseshoe, Pinky has to take over the famous ride.
programme.sub-title: Pinky Rider/The Midnight Ride Of Pink Revere

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Panthergeist': The Panther is assigned to remove a fastidious ghost from a castle. 'Pinky's Pending Pink Slip': The Panther has to think up new ways to teach biology to a problem student without the Principal catching him breaking the rules.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Using a special gelatin formula, gels the water in the canals of Venice in order to dig up Cleopatra's golden barge.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Nero gains strange powers (telekenesis), which, he uses to terrorize Danger Mouse and Penfold, after he falls into one of Greenback's inventions.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Colonel K thinks Danger Mouse has camouflaged himself and starts rambling. After Danger Mouse arrives to straighten up things, Danger Mouse and Penfold head to Canada to track down a Bigfoot that has been crushing the local villages and landscape.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Lifestyles of the Pink and Famous': When valet Pinky saves the life of a zillionaire, he's given a million dollar reward. 'Happy Trails Pinky': Pinky's stage coach company is threatened by the transcontinental railroad and a not too bright robber.
programme.sub-title: Lifestyles Of The Pink And Famous

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Pinxillated
programme.desc: When a little boy can't win enough tickets for a prize at the video arcade, Pink Panther helps him out with his video game prowess.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: A giant spaceship is spotted heading for Earth. It's part of the "Intergalactic 147" snooker game and it wants to pot the Earth into a black hole. This is the series finale.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback has placed a large number of sand pyramids all over England, threatening to sink the island Danger Mouse travels to the Sahara Desert to stop him.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Mayhem kidnaps a baby lizard Dinosaur from the jungle.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: Pink, Pink and Away': Super Pink flies into action when the Dogfather robs a bank and then accidentally kidnaps a little boy. 'Down on the Ant Farm': The Panther's experimental ant farm, complete with Ant, is accidentally delivered to the Aardvark.
programme.sub-title: Pink, Pink And Away/Down On The Ant Farm

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Planes are disappearing so Matt comes to investigate to insure the safety of his new jet which is to be shown to the military.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted get help from Henry Ford in repairing Detective Logan's classic car after they borrow it without permission. Along the way, they introduce an unusual Thanksgiving dinner to the Pilgrims and start the Wright Brothers on a new career.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Clutch Hawks enters Wildcat in the demolition duel in Memphis, only to learn Vanessa Warfield and Bruno "Mad Dog" Sheppard are also entered, with Manta and Stinger.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: A Pinker Tomorrow
programme.desc: Pink Panther wakes up to find himself in a colorless future.

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Duckula decides to become an actor and stages the story of Jack and the Magic Walnut at the castle.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM, working for a vengeful businessman, sets Frequency Resonator bombs off in buildings in Hong Kong.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback captures Colonel K and has the Colonel send Danger Mouse and Penfold on holiday to a haunted castle in Transylvania.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Arctic Circles
programme.desc: Duckula travels to the North Pole.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'The Ghost and Mr. Panther': Pinky unknowingly takes a job as a house sitter…at a haunted house! 'Cleopanthra': Pinky wants to make it as an architect in ancient Egypt but must contend with the Royal Architect who is out to destroy his work.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Set in frigid Alaska, the only serum to cure a deadly new disease has been stolen by VENOM.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold meet a space alien who has crash-landed in Birmingham and who has a pet tickle-hi-puss that likes to crawl up Penfold's trouser legs. However, the pet gets loose and whenever there is some physical impact, it multiplies.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: A special breed of metal eating bugs developed by the military is stolen by VENOM.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Mummy Dearest': The Panther opens the casket of Squawksalotta and is plagued by a talkative parrot who won't give him any peace. 'Feast or Famine': The Panther must choose between eating or saving a friendly lobster from a maniacal chef.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: After an avalanche, Matt, Scott and T-Bob discover a frozen Inca priest, Tupac, who knows where the Lost City of Gold is.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback creates a 'Martian' to keep Danger Mouse busy while he sets out on a crime spree which does nt last very long!

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold head to the North Pole on news that Baron Greenback and Stiletto have been selling over a thousand heat lamps to the Eskimos and causing the polar ice caps to melt.
programme.sub-title: I Spy with My Little Eye...

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: The challenge is a road race looping through the Devil's Punchbowl.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Deep in the Yucatan jungle at an ancient Mayan City a boy is seen lifting a very heavy stone with ease.

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Lost City of Atlantis
programme.desc: Count Duckula and co. are stuck on a tiny island.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Rock Me Pink': While trying to get a heavy metal rock star to play his song, Pinky becomes the concert's main attraction. 'Pinkus Pantherus': Pink joins the Roman Legion Army and ends up with the vindictive Manly Man as his commanding officer.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Home Stretch Pinky': Horse trainer Pinky tries to help Granny win the Kentucky Fedora - the world's famous horse race. 'Pink Pucks': To win a big hockey game, Pink conjures up Slusho to play goalie, only to have him lured away by an ice seductress.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback develops age-altering bombs which turn Danger Mouse into an over eager youth and puts Penfold on the verge of senility.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Pink on the Pitch
programme.desc: Pink Panther and his team of kids go up against Big Nose and his team of robots in a soccer game.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Hardluck Hotel
programme.desc: Duckula goes to stay at a worn out and run down hotel for the weekend.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Inside the Royal Albert Hall, Greenback reveals his new invention: a duplication machine he plans to use to make hundreds of Greenbacks so that no-one would find the real one.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Transylvanian Homesick Blues
programme.desc: Duckula, Igor and Nanny take a rollercoaster ride through time...literally!

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM steals an ancient chess set on its way to a museum.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 10
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a property in Maida Vale, a former stable in Wiltshire and two bed semi in Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Warrington, Dorset and Wales.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 12
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a flat in London, a house in Kent and a house in Greater Manchester.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 4
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a cluttered property in Derbyshire, a semi detached property in Kent and a three bedroomed terraced house in South Wales.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a restaurant in Kent, a semi in Stoke and a maisonette in Uxbridge.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a detached house in Devon, a property in Kent and a flat in Brighton.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 30
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin travel to Wiltshire to see an incredible Grade II star listed property going under the hammer! Then, it's onto Battersea, London to see a one bedroom garden flat, and in coastal Plymouth, Devon there's an unusual cottage up for auction.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 16
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a place with a low guide price in Derby, a three bed semi-detached house in Kent and a property in Stratford, east London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander look at properties in Canterbury, St. Helens and Norfolk.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 15
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a three bedroomed terraced house near Wigan, a property in Sheerness and a property in Devon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit houses Burnley, Kent and North London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 17
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Derby in need of a new layout; a Berkshire bungalow which is perfect if you're peckish for a property; and finally, a fire damaged Cornish semi in the village of St Blazey.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a property in Tavistock in Devon, a flat in Wembley and a semi detached property in Swindon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 9
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see an end of terrace in Ilkeston near Derby; a plot of land with planning consent in industrial Leyton in East London; and in the Wiltshire village of Atworth a tiny cottage with low ceilings, a wild garden and plenty of little secrets.

programme.title: Over the Top
programme.desc: A Championship title, a huge cash award, and his son's love -- the greatest prize of all -- are at stake when Hawk battles his strongest enemy for everything he has ever wanted.

programme.title: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Peter Sellers and Elke Sommer star in this successful sequel to The Pink Panther in which Inspector Clouseau tries to prove a beautiful parlor maid is innocent of killing her chauffer lover.

programme.title: Ghost in the Noonday Sun
programme.desc: In the 17th century, a pirate captain is murdered by his cook after he buries his treasure and marks it on a map but the poor-memory cook must rely on the captain's ghost to re-track the loot, since the map was drawn in disappearing ink.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

programme.title: Find the Lady
programme.desc: Two gun toting hoodlums, Trigger (Mickey Rooney) & Leo (Dick Emery) are hired by the unscrupulous J.K. (Peter Cook) to kidnap his niece Victoria. What follows is lunacy on a scale rarely seen!

programme.title: Bowery at Midnight
programme.desc: Kindly soup kitchen operator and professor of criminology, Karl Wagner, uses his soup kitchen as a front for a criminal gang. When things get out of hand, Wagner kills his henchmen, who wind up as zombies in the cellar of the soup kitchen.

programme.title: The Ape
programme.desc: Dr. Bernard Adrian is a kindly mad scientist who seeks to cure a young woman's polio. He needs spinal fluid from a human to complete the formula for his experimental serum.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Whom can she trust?

programme.title: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: A series of stories following a week in the life of a philandering tabloid journalist living in Rome.

programme.title: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Peter Sellers and Elke Sommer star in this successful sequel to The Pink Panther in which Inspector Clouseau tries to prove a beautiful parlor maid is innocent of killing her chauffer lover.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Deadly Delinquents
programme.desc: In the tormented mind of a young school girl, jealousy can turn to a murderous rage. These deadly girls turn on their own and kill their friends. This is the brutal world of deadly delinquents.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These deadly women were consumed by obsessions that overtook their minds and their lives. These women all had a fatal fixation.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1995, our nation's capital was also our nation's murder capital. Even the police weren't safe. While Washington, DC, law enforcement targeted criminals, the criminals targeted law enforcement, even gunning down officers on patrol.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Held For Ransom
programme.desc: Wealth has its rewards, but it also brings its dangers. Kidnapping is one of them. No ordeal is more horrifying for a family than to have a child taken.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Mission
programme.desc: When a family was murdered in Arkansas, it seemed like an isolated event. But soon the crime was revealed to be part of an ever-widening circle of violence that defined a new age of domestic terrorism.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Takeover
programme.desc: Two armed bank robbers hit a Seattle bank taking over 150,000 dollars. Before they can escape police confront them and the pair splits up. As authorities search block by block they learn one was a career criminal with a long history of violence.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Melissa Brannen: Missing
programme.desc: In 1989, residents of a close-knit apartment community in Virginia gathered for a holiday celebration. For Tammy Brannen and five-year-old daughter Melissa, Christmas was always a special time. Then, without warning, the little girl was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970's and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: In a plot to get to an airplane with a silent engine, Hogan gets Klink to believe that he is psychic.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: An African prince comes to Stalag 13 who is negotiating with the Germans for the rights in his country to build a submarine base and Hogan replaces him with Kinchloe.
programme.sub-title: The Prince From The Phone Company

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: As Hogan tries to help a German scientist defect, bumbling Colonel Crittendon interferes again.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants Klink to forget about a promotion so he plays cupid for him and General Burkhalter's sister.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: There seems to be a traitor in the escaped prisoner pipeline and Hogan has to find him by following the escape route.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Carter receives a Dear John letter and wants to join the rest of the prisoners that escape and go home.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study, but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogan's style.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter. Burkhalter finds out. Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for $1,000,000 in diamonds, but can he be trusted?

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi general's assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: As the Hammelburg Underground lodges a complaint against Hogan's success, Klink finds himself caught between the Gestapo and the Wehrmacht, each trying to take over Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is stymied over how to rescue a captured member of the underground until a potential diversion appears in the form of an old WWI buddy of Sgt. Schultz.
programme.sub-title: The Rise And Fall Of Sergeant Schultz

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany, so he creates a health spa.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: All goes well when Hogan's gang steals Klink's code book from his safe, photographs the contents, and returns it to its proper place. But there's a small hitch - Carter forgets to load the camera with film.
programme.sub-title: A Klink, A Bomb And A Short Fuse

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Newkirk discovers a new radio-controlled tank that could win the war for Germany, the allies want Hogan and the men to photograph the tank and then destroy it - but complications ensue during their mission.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: While trying to free the underground agent "Tiger" in Paris, Hogan must seek help from a Parisian fortune teller and also enlist the aid of a man who is a look-alike for Nazi Police Chief Heinrich Himmler!

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: With camp security raised, Hogan and his men are desperate to smuggle some top-secret plans of German fortifications to the Allies. The solution? Make liberal use of Carter's remarkable impersonation of Adolf Hitler.
programme.sub-title: Will The Real Adolf Please Stand Up

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The aristocratic Colonel Klink fails a routine physical exam and lands a combat assignment at the Russian front! Fearing a hard-line replacement at Stalag 13, the men must do all they can to rescind Klink's marching papers.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Col. Hogan is less than thrilled when he is assigned to help an obnoxious American general flee Stalag 13 - and the secret plan, involving a prisoner swap, winds up as trying and difficult as the arrogant escapee himself.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Suspecting a security leak at Stalag 13, Gen. Burkhalter goes fishing with some false information and Col. Hogan falls for the bait. As a result, Burkhalter plants a spy among the prisoners to expose the guilty parties.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: An assertive Gen. Burkhalter "requisitions" the famous Édouard Manet painting, "The Fife Player," from the Louvre museum in Paris to give to Hermann Goering as a birthday present. Undaunted by seemingly impossible logistics, Hogan and LeBeau decide to ste

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's plan to relieve the bombing pressure on London with a trap hinges on Carter's ability to remember the name of a town - Leadingham.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When the gang's hidden cache of money - needed to purchase a secret map - goes up in smoke, the men of Stalag 13 must come up with a way to replace the cash - and decide to pull off a bank heist in the nearby town.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Nearby war games inspire Hogan to replace some of the blank German ammunition with live ammo, using Klink's birthday as a diversion.
programme.sub-title: Praise The Fuerher And Pass The Ammunition

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan nixes a mission to destroy a synthetic fuel plant because the caper is too risky...but he is overruled - and forced to participate in the scheme by the ploy's mastermind, a strong-willed determined female scientist.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Masquerading as German workers, Hogan and the crew have made elaborate and foolproof plans to blow a German cannon factory sky-high - but their plan backfires when Newkirk winds up being drafted into the German army.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When an important Third Reich official wants to defect, Hogan brings him to Stalag 13 - and convinces Col. Klink that the fugitive is Adolf Hitler in disguise...who is trying to elude assassins by hiding at the camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground, Hogan causes a marital tiff, which, to fix, requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: While awaiting word to complete a sabotage mission, Stalag 13 gets a new officer under Klink - Burkhalter's alert brother-in-law, who enjoys tormenting prisoners.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Hochstetter works to lower a French pilot's resistance to interrogation, Hogan brings the man's fiancee to camp to have Klink marry them.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The presence of a masterful escape-artist POW threatens to destabilize Hogan's set-up at Stalag 13.
programme.sub-title: Most Escape-Proof Prison Camp I've Ever Escaped From

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan enlists an attractive agent's help in blackmailing Gen. Burkhalter so Klink won't be punished for the destruction of a newly built radio tower.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: To improve the camp's inspection rating, Klink transfers in a stern German sergeant who quickly makes life miserable for staff and prisoners alike with his overly strict and unwavering adherence to all regulations. All want him gone.

programme.desc: This week, Jon puts his body on the line as he tackles a drunken yob in a domestic row.

programme.desc: The interceptors stop a coach load of cage fighters.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 1

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Sea Monster Hunters
programme.desc: Legend Hunters search the waters of British Columbia, Canada to discover the truth behind the creatures of the deep.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Hunters of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: The Holy Grail, the cup used by Jesus Christ at the Last Supper has inspired countless searches in numerous countries by adventurers, knights and kings.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Hunters of Noah's Ark
programme.desc: The story of Noah‚Äôs Ark is one of the most enduring tales of the Old Testament. Thought to rest in Turkey, discovery of the Ark has been the focus of many explorers throughout the ages.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Bigfoot Hunters
programme.desc: Legend Hunters try to determine if a eight foot tall ape runs wild in North America.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS WORKS OF ART
programme.desc: Great art and its creators unveil mysteries more intricate than TV dramas. Amidst theft and intrigue, we persist in solving them. Yet, the truth often lies buried with those who created it, adding layers of intrigue to the art world.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PLACES WITH HEALING POWERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at places that are said to have healing power including Lourdes where people have been cured by drinking water from a cave, Machu Picchu, Stonehenge, the Dead Sea, the Ganges.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS CREATURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries examines mysterious creatures that may live in Earth including the chupacabra, the Loch Ness Monster, the thunderbird,) the yeti or Bigfoot.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNSOLVED MYSTERIES IN PHYSICS
programme.desc: In the late 19th century, scientists thought all major physics laws were discovered. Now, we realize vast unknowns remain. Despite our understanding, mysteries persist in the physical world.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: RELICS OF THE SAINT
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the relics of the saints including the Shrine of the Three Kings, the Tilman of Our Lady of Guadalupe, the Holy Foreskin, the Ark of the Covenant, the Remain of Mary Magdalene, Buddha's Tooth, and the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPERNATURAL ABILITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at supernatural abilities including exceptional endurance in fire-walking and the festival of penitence, telepathy, shamans, mysterious recoveries from illness, clairvoyance.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PEOPLE WITHOUT IDENTITY
programme.desc: 10 Mysterious Figures: Individuals who emerged from obscurity, made their mark on history, then vanished without a trace. Their identities remain unconfirmed, shrouding them in mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: HUMAN SACRIFICES
programme.desc: Human sacrifice, practiced since the Paleolithic era, was seen as a gift to gods for cosmic order. Found in black magic, voodoo, and Satanism, these rituals may hint at a mysterious connection to higher forces.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PARANORMAL ACTIVITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at paranormal activities including apparitions and ghosts, the dark day mystery, Marian Apparitions, curses, warnings from beyond, spontaneous combustion.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRETS AND MAGIC OF ALTERNATIVE MEDICINE
programme.desc: In this episode, we dive into untraditional healing and its mysteries, challenging conventional Western medicine. Explore alternative medical miracles that will captivate you.
programme.sub-title: SECRETS AND MAGIC OF ALTERNATIVE MEDICINE

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SACRED BUILDINGS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the sacred places and buildings of ancient and medieval people including the Great Pyramid of Giza, Chartres Cathedral, Derinkuyu Underground City, Santiago de Compostela Catherdral.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS AND UNSOLVED DISSAPEARANCES
programme.desc: Legally declared dead, bodies never found. Disappearances spark speculation, media attention, and unanswered questions. Where did they go?

programme.desc: A college graduate strikes up a relationship with her superior at a new job. When he becomes abusive, her attempts to escape prove to be no match for the highly trained investigator.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Power Play
programme.desc: Jane Haag rarely has time to date until she falls in love with Ron. But Jane discovers that Ron is a virtual time bomb about to explode.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: In the Spotlight
programme.desc: A well-respected TV news journalist in San Diego is stalked by a deranged fan who threatens rape and murder if she doesn't follow explicit instructions while on air.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Addicted to Rage
programme.desc: Katie Socci stands by her fiancé, David, even after he's charged with stealing narcotics. But once she finally throws him out, he unleashes the deadly fury of a stalker scorned.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Campaign of Terror
programme.desc: Bob Krueger is devastated to lose a race for the Senate. But nothing could protect his family from the obsession of a former staffer who now threatens to destroy them.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Dire Straits
programme.desc: A college student in Staten Island meets a deceivingly charming man who sweeps her off her feet. But the relationship turns sour when his true nature is revealed.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Above the Law
programme.desc: Vicki Kuper finds new love with Jack. But his jealous tendencies soon rise to the surface and Vicki struggles to escape his grasp in this small town nightmare.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Just-Terry-Fied
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be test 2 scenes from Justified where, Terry finds himself in a bathtub and a dead body lying over top of him.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Bond, Terry Bond
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be testing the effectiveness of driving a vehicle with fully automatic machine guns mounted to the car!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves Superheros
programme.desc: Holy Hollywood Weapons! Terry and Larry put some of your favorite Superhero’s to the test. Tune in to the same Bat Outdoor Channel for the results!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry and The Minigun
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier).

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Homemade gules to test stickiness; puzzle with a scientific optical illusion; supersonic car.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of IVF; following couples who undertake IVF treatment; going 360 degrees on a swing.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Boat made out of ice; comets; science behind hypothermia.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Jem builds a laser; Yan recreates a demonstration to calculate the speed of light.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hottest and Coldest
programme.desc: George meets ultra-marathon runners in searing heat of Death Valley and bone-chilling cold of the Yukon. He dog-sleds in snow and meets wild characters like Caveman Bill, who has lived alone in a cave through 12 long cold Yukon winters.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Timbuktu: Birthplace of Hurricanes
programme.desc: Dust storms can spin off from Africa into the Atlantic and morph into tropical hurricanes that threaten the Caribbean and USA. While searching for Timbuktu's dust storms, George finds adventure in the landscape and culture of West Africa.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fin Del Mundo
programme.desc: Although he admits to not being much of a sailor, George climbs aboard a sailing vessel to explore the extreme southern tip of South America (Fin Del Mundo aka the "End of the World").

programme.title: Angry Planet: Midwest Stormfest
programme.desc: This season the tornadoes begin early - in February. Through the season, George follows the big weather from Missouri west to the Dakotas, and dodges the huge, destructive Greensburg tornado in southern Kansas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hawaii: Surf & Snow
programme.desc: In Hawaii George explores the wild side: diving with Galapagos sharks, ascending to snow-covered Mauna Kea, dental cleaning by Peppermint Cleaner Shrimp, extreme surfing at Banzai Pipeline, getting his boots lit on fire by Kilauea volcano.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Elephant Cave
programme.desc: Waterfall-shrouded Kitum Cave has been carved out by elephants in search of salt on Mount Elgon at the Kenya-Uganda border. George gets bitten by one of the cave bats suspected of carrying the deadly Marburg virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane Triple Threat
programme.desc: George chases deadly hurricanes in the USA: Gustav in Louisiana and Hanna in North Carolina. He then flies with USAF Hurricane Hunters into Ike over Cuba, meeting it again as it makes a wild destructive landfall in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Empty Quarter
programme.desc: The Empty Quarter is a windswept area of sand dunes. In a tiny corner of this vast desert lies Dubai, a glitzy ultra-modern playground. George heads out from Abu Dhabi on a 4W safari to see both sides of this corner of Arabia.

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.
programme.sub-title: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of Tornado
programme.desc: Tornados are one of the most destructive forces of the planets with winds at 300 miles an hour. They can destroy buildings and hurl cars hundreds of feet through the air.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.
programme.sub-title: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Mystery of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Milky Way chronicles the history of telescopes, from Galileo's refractor to Newton's reflector and beyond. This episode also looks at recent missions, including the Herschel Space Observatory's examination of the Milky Wa
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Milky Way

programme.title: In the Shadow of the Moon
programme.desc: Between 1968 and 1972, the world watched in awe each time an American spacecraft voyaged to the Moon. Only 12 men walked upon its surface and they remain the only human beings to have stood on another world.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 6: Fermi paradox
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 4: Black Holes
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 7: The Milky Way
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 1: The Solar System
programme.desc: This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see, how we can live in space and what science tells us about the past and the future as we journey inside out of space.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 8: Extravehicular Activity
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Moon Shots: Inside the Lost Apollo Archive
programme.desc: The world famous Apollo missions are some of the greatest feats ever accomplished by man. With rare archive footage and unprecedented access to life on board the Apollo spacecrafts, this stunning one-hour special brings scientific history to life.

programme.title: Neil Armstrong: One Small Step
programme.desc: Neil Armstrong has stamped his place in history by becoming the first person to walk on the moon.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 1
programme.desc: Between 1960 and 1972, mankind boldly went where no human had been before. Across 11 manned missions, 24 men flew to the moon and 12 walked upon its surface. This film documents Apollo 17 through the eyes of the astronauts who flew.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 2
programme.desc: In this episode, hear first hand testimonials and dialogue from the incredible men who walked on the moon. Incredible footage and photos give a unique and beautiful experience of their data collection process and journey home.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: What Is Space?
programme.desc: Brian Greene reveals space as a dynamic fabric that can stretch, twist, warp, and ripple under the influence of gravity, and explores dark energy, which makes up 70% of the universe.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Join Brian Greene on a wild ride into the weird realm of quantum physics, which governs the universe on the tiniest of scales.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Universe or Multiverse?
programme.desc: Cutting-edge theories are suggesting that our universe may not be the only universe. Instead, it may be just one of an infinite number of worlds that make up the multiverse.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: The Illusion of Time
programme.desc: Brian Greene takes us on the ultimate time traveling adventure, hurtling 50 years into the future before stepping into a wormhole to travel back to Big Bang.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Proving Einstein
programme.desc: Some of the proof of Einstein’s theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Emissaries
programme.desc: Our solar system is vast, from our own star the Sun to Earth is nearly 150 million kilometers or 1 Astronomical Unit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Fresh Eyes

programme.title: The New Frontier: PEERING INTO THE ABYSS

programme.title: The New Frontier: Mars: Adapt Or Leave
programme.desc: As the latest successes and failures come and go Mars continues to give up her secrets.

programme.title: Meltdown

programme.desc: Jim and David begin an off-the-books investigation into a bailed heroin dealer. When they discover the dealer's underground safe, they hatch a plan to break into it for their own gains. But they realise a little too late that it is a bad idea.

programme.title: Union Bound
programme.desc: Union Bound is a thrilling Civil War film that shows the strength and courage of the human spirit. Sergeant Joseph Hoover went to war to preserve the Union but finds himself captured and sent to a prisoner of war camp.

programme.title: Valhalla: Legend of Thor
programme.desc: When Thor and Loki seek refuge in the home of mortals, the youngest son fails to heed a warning from the gods.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Star of Heaven

programme.title: In The Line of Duty
programme.desc: Disgraced cop Frank is on a mission to find the Chief of Police’s abducted daughter. After killing the abductor, all hell breaks loose when the abductor’s brother arrives thirsty for revenge.
