programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: Steve battles rush hour traffic to manoeuvre his recovery vehicle around the narrow roads to get to a 7.5-tonne lorry out of a ditch, while Rory must deliver a dodgy van to a scrapyard for destruction.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: Lantern's only female driver Merrie is tasked with the removal of an abandoned lorry, but it is soon clear this will not be a routine job. As she takes a closer look, she discovers that not only has the lorry been used as a mobile home, but that it is hou

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: Rory risks life and limb to recovered a skip lorry from the M1. Jim has a happy reunion with his own truck. Chris has to find a way of separating two HGVs that have somehow become wedged together.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: Jim faces mayhem on the motorway when a massive pile-up blocks the busy M1.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Marta and Pat have to pull a bin lorry out of a muddy ditch. But first they must battle their way through a thick wall of thorns.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Jim and Steve face one of their riskiest recoveries when a tanker carrying highly corrosive pure sulphuric acid smashes into the central reservation of a busy A road and overturns.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: It is all hands to the pumps at a bus depot in Tamworth, where Crouch's finest are joined by Lanterns' Merrie. Just days after Christmas the owners lost their school coaches to a devastating fire and need the wreckage removed.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: A smouldering, 44-tonne food lorry blocks an M1 slip road.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A milk tanker needs rescuing from a boggy field.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: Steve goes into battle with a heavyweight transformer.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: Nick is tasked with finding a 4 x 4.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: Tez rescues a 44 tonne artic from the side of the busy A1.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Stig is reunited with a regular.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Steve and his team must recover a 26 tonne lorry.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Steve makes a grim discovery while trying to lift a truck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Tez and the team get in a jam.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Rescuing a delivery truck from a pond, and a horsebox from a muddy field.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: A tipper truck has slid down a steep motorway embankment.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: Lee recovers a lorry with a ruptured fuel tank.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: A gravel truck has ended up in a ditch.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Curse of the Evil Eye
programme.desc: Shredder is in control of the Eye of Sarnoth, enabling him to transmute matter. Shredder brings to life a dragon which soars through the air with shocked shellbacks Leonardo and Michelangelo aboard.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Case of the Killer Pizzas
programme.desc: The Turtles' favourite food, pizza, is also the source of their problem. Nasty, fanged creatures have been planted in pizza boxes! When the critters crack open their chrysalises, they become enormous.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Fly
programme.desc: Shredder sends April a rare duko plant that renders her unconscious. The Turtles seek a rare leaf that can serve as an antidote.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Punk Frogs
programme.desc: Mutagen, sent by Krang from Dimension X, changes four Florida frogs into half-human creatures four and a half feet tall. Shredder, training them in his evil ways, names them Attila the Frog, Genghis Frog, Rasputin the Mad Frog and Napoleon Bonafrog.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter No More
programme.desc: Michelangelo senses that their mentor is "mondo depressed" and Donatello finds a way of changing back Splinter the rat to Yoshi the man.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): New York's Shiniest
programme.desc: Shredder taps into New York's computers to steal plans for robots and creates an army of robots to destroy the Turtles and loot the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Neutrino teens Kala, Zak and Eask arrive on Earth and alert the Turtles to Shredder's latest plan to make "mindless zombies" of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Catwoman from Channel 6
programme.desc: A matter transporter results in strange happenings including TV reporter April O'Neil being put into a cat-like state and a tiger chasing the Turtles and Splinter, their mentor-rat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Technodrome
programme.desc: To bring the Technodrome back to Earth, Shredder is instructed to take over the Niagara Falls hydroelectric station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beneath These Streets
programme.desc: While the Turtles, in disguise, are at a movie, Shredder interrupts a press conference to steal a new medi-laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on Trial
programme.desc: While the Turtles go on a talk show to prove their innocence to the world, Krang steals a robot and some Solarbenite from a military warehouse, with the intention of destroying the Turtles himself.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the 50-Foot Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are planning Irma's birthday party, Shredder steals an Exaboron Isotope from a meteorite crash. Krang creates an Exaboron-powered Enlarging Ray which causes six times normal growth, with the intention of using it on Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Maltese Hamster
programme.desc: Shredder gives futuristic laser weapons to mobster Tony Vivaldi and his underlings. Shredder wants to find the Maltese Hamster statue of him, which has inside it the formula for ultimate fuel for the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sky Turtles
programme.desc: Krang creates a Gravity Altering Device which causes everyone in the city, including the Turtles, to start floating.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Old Switcheroo
programme.desc: Two huge electrodes at Cybertech Labs produce a startling effect on two long-time foes. The mind of the Turtles master Splinter winds up in the body of the evil Shredder - and vice versa, causing confusion among their associates.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Burne's Blues
programme.desc: Burne is out to prove to April that he can still dig in the trenches and find good stories after deriding her for failing to come up with anything good lately.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Fifth Turtle
programme.desc: On the occasion of a rare conjunction of the Earth, Moon, and Stars, Shredder steals some Capsidium Crystals.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Rat King
programme.desc: April does a story on the rat problem the city is facing, and the Rat King kidnaps her. The Rat King is the leader of all the rats under his form of government known as the Ratocracy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles at the Earth's Core
programme.desc: The Turtles venture down to the Earth's core and discover a lost prehistoric world complete with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Foolish
programme.desc: Emperor Aleister and his daughter Princess Mallory arrive from the small kingdom of Malacuria where there has been a recent discovery of a vast deposit of Lydium - 90, the most powerful source of energy found on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Big MACC
programme.desc: At an army testing lab where a super laser is being demonstrated, the crowd is surprised by the arrival of MACC, a robot from the year 2399 that talks like a cowboy from watching old western movies on inter-dimensional trips.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ninja Sword of Nowhere
programme.desc: Krang detects the existence of an alien metal that could help him conquer the Earth. It happens to be on a Ninja Sword the Turtles have purchased for Splinter as a National Sensei Appreciation Day gift.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): 20,000 Leaks Under the City
programme.desc: Krang is out to liquidate the Turtles by pumping water through the Earth's crust and into the sewer system. The super pump starts sucking up the entire ocean and soon the streets are covered with three feet of water.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Take Me to Your Leader
programme.desc: Leonardo cannot take the pressure of being the leader of the Turtles anymore and leaves. Meanwhile, Krang and Shredder use their Solar Siphon to drain all the energy from the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Four Musketurtles
programme.desc: Leonardo becomes a little soft in the shell after he is knocked on the head. He thinks he is D' Artagan and that the other Turtles are the Three Musketeers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles, Turtles, Everywhere!
programme.desc: The city's new state-of-the-art garbage disposal system's main computer DUMP 1000 is programmed by Shredder to seize the Turtles but starts scooping up every turtle in sight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cowabunga Shredhead
programme.desc: With the aid of the Holographic Synthesizer, Shredder creates an exact likeness of Michelangelo and programs it to invade the Turtles' lair and destroy them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Turtle Snatchers
programme.desc: Donatello and Rocksteady are beamed up to a space ship - by little alien, Nikto, six thousand years old, traveling with his parents Klaatu and Barada.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Camera Bugged
programme.desc: The polarisoid, an alien tourist visiting Earth, causes all sorts of commotion with his camera which sucks everything it photos literally inside the camera, including City Hall.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Green with Jealousy
programme.desc: In order to steal nuclear energy from a submarine, Krang creates a love potion which induces lovesickness in all of the Turtles - except Donatello, who does not eat the potion-laced pizza.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of the Fly
programme.desc: Intent on revenge against both the Turtles, Krang and Shredder, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) returns with a bug of a plan. While the Turtles are battling Shredder, the insect tries to exterminate the entire group!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mutagen Monster
programme.desc: The chemicals from two carriages in a train wreck unite to form a mutagen, and steers licking up the goo are transformed into a bull-headed monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Corporate Raiders From Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder utilizes a hypnotizing device and creates zombies out of CEOs all over the city. Ultimately, the plan is to raise the Technodrome from the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pizza By The Shred
programme.desc: In order to locate the Turtles' lair and destroy them, Shredder opens a pizza parlour. When the Turtles order a pizza, Shredder places a locator-tracking device on it disguised as an anchovy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Bebop & Mighty Rocksteady
programme.desc: Krang creates Cybernetic Clones of Rocksteady, only ten times as strong and ten times as smart.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Shredder endeavours to enlist the aid of the ghost of Shibano-Sama, a noble warrior who lived hundreds of years ago, to destroy the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead: Terror of the Swamp
programme.desc: The Turtles go south to the swamps when their friends the Frogs -and Napoleon Bonafrog - are in trouble. The source of their predicament is Leatherhead, a half-human, half-alligator mutation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo's Birthday
programme.desc: It's Michelangelo's birthday - and his good buddies are pretending they're unaware of it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi Yojimbo
programme.desc: Shredder's Teleporter, which can teletransport objects to a pre­determined location, interferes with Donatello's transdimensional reception - and Usagi Yojimbo, a 14th century Samurai rabbit, pops out of the Turtles' screen.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mysterious Vanishings
programme.desc: Mysterious Vanishings: Baffling stories of people who vanished without a trace, including a young Tasmanian pilot who is chased by unidentified aircraft before disappearing.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: Medics at a hospital fall gravely ill after treating a mysteriously ailing patient in a circumstance that can't be explained by science. Or can it?

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mind Control
programme.desc: Mind Control: Three spine-tingling stories, including a seance that turns a housewife into a literary genius as she channels a spirit to write a series of acclaimed books.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet: A high-rise window washer somehow survives a 50-storey fall and ball-sized ice chunks fall from the sky.
programme.sub-title: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Texas Lights, The Bloop, Vanishing Boat
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Texas Lights, The Bloop, Vanishing Boat: Residents of a Texas town report strange lights in the night sky.
programme.sub-title: Texas Lights, The Bloop, Vanishing Boat

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Sea Lions, Voynich Manuscript, Cocaine Mummies
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Sea Lions, Voynich Manuscript, Cocaine Mummies: A look at a mysterious medieval manuscript and Egyptian mummies containing cocaine from Peru.
programme.sub-title: Sea Lions, Voynich Manuscript, Cocaine Mummies

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Dolphin Saviours, Grim Reapers, Hysterical Strength
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Dolphin Saviours, Grim Reapers, Hysterical Strength: A look at dolphin rescues, death-smelling pets and a skinny teen with unbelievable strength.
programme.sub-title: Dolphin Saviours, Grim Reapers, Hysterical Strength

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Sailing Stones, Brown Mountain Lights, Super Human Runner
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Sailing Stones, Brown Mountain Lights, Super Human Runner: A look at Death Valley boulders, mysterious dancing lights and super-marathon runners.
programme.sub-title: Sailing Stones, Brown Mountain Lights, Super Human Runner

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception: Check out mind-reading plants, pagan human sacrifice and Californian time travellers.
programme.sub-title: Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Lightning Strikes, Human Hibernation, Chinese Anchors
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Lightning Strikes, Human Hibernation, Chinese Anchors: A man survives six lightning strikes, while a toddler is frozen solid and thawed unharmed.
programme.sub-title: Lightning Strikes, Human Hibernation, Chinese Anchors

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Bullet Proof Boobs, Amazing Coincidences, Directional Cows
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Bullet Proof Boobs, Amazing Coincidences, Directional Cows: Cows align with the Earth's magnetic field, and a young makes an incredible connection.
programme.sub-title: Bullet Proof Boobs, Amazing Coincidences, Directional Cows

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Cellular Memory, Ice Circles, Chimera
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Cellular Memory, Ice Circles, Chimera: Check out a heart patient's unbelievable transformation, circles of ice in rivers and a shocking DNA test.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: The Hobbit, Limb Generation, Mind Over Matter
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. The Hobbit, Limb Generation, Mind Over Matter: A look at the future of mind control, an extinct hobbit race and whether humans can regenerate limbs.
programme.sub-title: The Hobbit, Limb Generation, Mind Over Matter

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Alien Encounters: A cow is mutilated, a man is repeatedly abducted from his bed, and an astronomer's telescope intercepts a mysterious message.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Life After Death
programme.desc: Life After Death: Scientists in England conduct groundbreaking séances, while someone returns from the grave.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Monsters
programme.desc: Monsters: A fisherman uncovers the remains of an unidentified sea creature on a beach, and a hairy creature causes panic in New Delhi.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: The End Of The World
programme.desc: The End of the World: Decoding Mayan texts, a physicist predicts a cataclysm will destroy the world. A NASA scientist makes an alien discovery.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Parallel Worlds
programme.desc: Parallel Worlds: While hiking, a woman has a terrifying encounter with an entity from another world.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Freaks Of Nature
programme.desc: Freaks Of Nature: A small community is devastated by an earth-shattering 'boom,' while an paranormal fog seems to alter the very fabric of time.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Paranormal Mysteries
programme.desc: Paranormal Mysteries: A woman is terrorised by an invisible attacker and a mother undergoes a violent and demonic transformation.

programme.title: Corporate: Trademarq
programme.desc: Trademarq: Hampton DeVille partners with a street artist who vandalised the company's headquarters to sell anti-corporate merch and profit off its protesters. (S1, E04)

programme.title: Corporate: Corporate Retreat
programme.desc: Corporate Retreat: At the Hampton DeVille corporate retreat, business gurus teach Matt how to be a more confident person, and Jake finds love at a networking mixer. (S1, E05)

programme.title: Corporate: Casual Friday
programme.desc: Casual Friday: Matt and Jake struggle to convince a co-worker to wear a shirt on Casual Friday, and Christian seeks to strike a deal with a group of megachurches. (S1, E06)

programme.title: Corporate: The Long Meeting
programme.desc: The Long Meeting: Forced to take charge of a meeting after Christian gets a call, John and Kate trap the staff in the conference room without their phones until they finish brainstorming. (S1, E07)

programme.title: Corporate: Society Tomorrow
programme.desc: Society Tomorrow: As the staff obsesses over a prestige TV show, Jake resists their attempts to force him to watch, while Matt's life starts to eerily echo the events of the series. (S1, E08)

programme.title: Corporate: Weekend
programme.desc: Weekend: John pressures Jake and Matt into helping him move a grandfather clock in his apartment, sabotaging their weekend plans. (S1, E09)

programme.title: Corporate: Remember Day
programme.desc: Remember Day: Matt copes with his family trauma by throwing himself into the office holiday party, Christian questions his worldview, and Jake considers leaving the company. (S1, E10)

programme.title: Corporate: The One Who's There
programme.desc: The One Who's There: Matt tries not to develop a crush on a new colleague, and Christian buys a news network. Nihilistic, satirical sitcom from Comedy Central U.S. (S2, E01)

programme.title: Corporate: The Concert
programme.desc: The Concert: When Matt's old college buddy invites him to hang out, he's determined to prove he's still young and fun. Nihilistic, satirical sitcom from Comedy Central U.S. (S2, E02)

programme.title: Corporate: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Natural Beauty: Matt starts wearing makeup, and Jake begins work on a project to market makeup to men. Nihilistic, satirical sitcom from Comedy Central U.S. (S2, E03)

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Happy Ummaversary
programme.desc: Janet plans to get the Kim family together for their first family dinner in 15 years, but it almost proves too much for Jung and Appa to handle.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Thinkin' About Inkin'
programme.desc: Janet considers a new tattoo. Jung and Shannon exchange five-week-iversary gifts. Umma and Appa discover some juicy gossip about Pastor Nina.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Soccer Dad
programme.desc: Appa unwittingly becomes Jung's soccer coach. Umma insists that Janet learn to cook. Shannon forces a birthday party on Stacie.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Beacon of Truth
programme.desc: Appa eavesdrops on Gerald and Chelsea getting together to tell a lie to her parents. Appa says that he knows whenever Janet has told a lie.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Chammo!
programme.desc: Janet is commissioned to take portraits of Shannon's cats. Umma entrusts Jung to pick Appa up from the dentist, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Which Witch is Which
programme.desc: Umma reevaluates her role as a mother. Appa comes into money and tries to do a good thing with it. Jung and Shannon discover they have different concepts of sexy.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: In the Bedroom
programme.desc: Appa and Umma come up with a new sleeping arrangement. Jung pursues a new career and tries to involve Janet. Meanwhile, Shannon and Kimchee discover a new, slightly terrifying side of Terence.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Jung shows Shannon his nurturing side. Chelsea and Gerald get in the way of Janet's summer plans. Appa is invited to lead a business seminar but is forced to share the spotlight.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Knife Strife
programme.desc: Umma believes she has discovered a murder weapon. Janet realizes she and Nathan have nothing in common. At Handy, Kimchee struggles to fit in with the other regional managers.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Bon Voyage
programme.desc: Appa and Umma's plans for the future push Appa out of his comfort zone. Janet gets an internship overseas while Jung and Kimchee explore new living arrangements.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa reaps the benefits of Umma's accessible parking pass. Janet embraces a new ambition. Meanwhile, Shannon and Jung spice up their long-distance romance.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Channouncements
programme.desc: A local celebrity takes over Umma's announcement duties at church. Appa takes issue with Janet's journaling. Shannon allows shorts in the office.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appa & Linus
programme.desc: Appa unknowingly ruins Gerald's baby blanket. Jung invites Kimchee for a weekend in California. Janet tries to convince Umma to join a support group.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Tennis Anyone?
programme.desc: Appa and Umma sneak into a fancy neighborhood to play tennis. Shannon gives Omar some dubious advice. Janet befriends a coworker.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: A Tangled Web
programme.desc: Cousin Nayoung arrives with an unconventional pet. Jung and Shannon have a stressful lunch with Umma. Kimchee ignores a coworker's feelings.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Cookie Monster
programme.desc: Appa finds marijuana in the house. Shannon throws a staff party that doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: Appa and Kimchee enjoy an impromptu hangout together. Janet and Umma find an envelope of money in the store. Jung and Shannon struggle to watch TV together.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: Appa worries about Umma after a minor household accident. Janet uses Jung's past to boost her reputation with students. A high school reunion has Kimchee thinking about an old flame.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Field of Schemes
programme.desc: Appa's reputation as an impartial umpire faces a stiff test. Jung and Kimchee disagree about discipline. Janet worries a sweater may be haunted.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Who's Pranking Who?
programme.desc: Kimchee's plan to impress the higher-ups backfires. Shannon inadvertently insults Umma's cooking. Appa and Janet enter a prank war.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Matchy Matchy
programme.desc: Umma tries to set up Janet with their new mason. Shannon encourages Jung to give Appa a gift. Kimchee and Shannon work on employee evaluations.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Hugs & Prayers
programme.desc: Janet and Appa take a first aid course. Umma worries her prayers cause more harm than good. Shannon and Jung discuss their relationship.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Friends and Family
programme.desc: Jung gives Appa and Umma a business presentation for the store. Shannon and Kimchee's office teasing leads to a meaningful discovery for Kimchee.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: New Appa-liance
programme.desc: Appa's got a plan to get a new appliance for less, Jung looks to mend old fences and Janet searches for a way to differentiate herself online.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Cutie Pie
programme.desc: Appa worries Umma will be jealous of a flirty online review. Jung returns to his old stomping grounds. Gerald's girlfriend ruffles Janet's feathers.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Open Kimunication
programme.desc: Appa and Umma take their bickering to a new level. Janet crosses paths with a photography idol. Shannon's boyfriend asks Jung for a favor.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Thy Neighbour's Wifi
programme.desc: Appa has a solution for spotty Wi-Fi: use the neighbor's. Jung has eyes for Shannon's friend. Umma and Pastor Nina ask Janet to do a church reading.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Army Spoon
programme.desc: Gerald photographs Appa and his spoon for an exhibit. Janet's apology for a restaurant faux pas doesn't go well. Umma receives an alarming call.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: The Kim Cup
programme.desc: An old ping-pong table rekindles a rivalry between Appa and Jung. Umma sets out to bond with Janet but finds Chelsea to be more receptive.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appanoon Delight
programme.desc: Appa's quest to retrieve his drill from Janet leads to an amorous encounter with Umma. Jung gives Kimchee unsolicited advice and plenty of it.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: When his daughter takes part in an anti-nuclear rally, Kessler is suspected of leaking classified information that leads directly to nuclear sabotage.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: ICS must find a sadistic kidnapper before he auctions off his 12-year-old victim on a pedophile website.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Kessler discovers a Croatian war criminal has been granted amnesty, and must struggle with demons from his own past in Bosnia.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Three American soldiers plunge into the Niagara River and swim to Canada. Deserters, refusing to return to Iraq under the U.S.’s “stop loss” policy, they seek refugee status in Canada.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A cache of missing chips from a closed down casino turn up in Vegas and a string of murders follow, leading Langston to use deadly force for the first time in his career as a CSI.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While Grissom leads a group of college students on a tour of CSI, the dead speak while the CSIs investigate, each narrating their own case

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate first-hand the behind-the-scenes action of Cirque du Soleil in order to determine what may have contributed to a young dancer's untimely death.

programme.title: Sea Patrol: Episode 009
programme.desc: Hammersley is in foreign waters assisting Madelaine Cruise on another clandestine ASIO mission. In a daring and dangerous evacuation on foreign soil, the RHIB party seek to rescue ASIO Agent Smith under gunfire.

programme.title: Sea Patrol: Episode 010
programme.desc: A team building exercise for the junior Hammersley sailors turns into a deadly nightmare, meanwhile long kept secrets are reaching crisis point on board.

programme.title: Sea Patrol: Episode 011
programme.desc: After a wild night on the town in the port of Samjung, one member of the Hammersley crew wakes to find he has a crushing hangover, a beautiful woman by his side - and a wedding ring on his finger.

programme.title: Sea Patrol: Episode 012
programme.desc: Hammersley is deployed to intercept GD Security mercenary vessel, the MV Sassy and escort her back to port. Maxine asks for Mike's help in finding Ryan who went AWOL, having left before his discharge papers gone through.

programme.title: Sea Patrol: Episode 013
programme.desc: The crew of the Hammersley race to disarm a dirty bomb. Meanwhile, Kate ponders a proposal from Jim.

programme.title: Sea Patrol: Episode 001
programme.desc: When HMAS Hammersley answers a distress call from Bright Island, Captain Mike Flynn and his crew discover a young woman lying paralysed on the beach.

programme.title: Sea Patrol: Episode 002
programme.desc: The Hammersley uncovers a sophisticated drug smuggling network, with explosive results. Mike is convinced the Federal Police are covering up the poisoning death of a marine biologist.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: Andy heads out with a very-pregnant Marlo to find a volatile woman who’s gone missing after group therapy, but neither Andy nor Marlo are prepared when Marlo suddenly goes into labor.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived (Ep. 520), it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment. So when Juliet offers Andy an opportunity to leave town for 4 months on an undercover project, Andy starts to consider it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: Andy and Sam’s wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah. But when Andy is taken off-course by a hitchhiker and then stranded on the side of a dead-end road with a dying man, she finds herself with no way to get help

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Berman
programme.desc: Rodney and Jean Berman need cash to fund a trip to Hong Kong to visit their son.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Owen
programme.desc: David and Barbara Owen hope to raise money for a special family reunion.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Payne
programme.desc: A couple hopes to raise money for life-changing laser eye surgery.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Stelling
programme.desc: Siblings John and Kate want to sell their father's collections to fund their own pursuits.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Hazel
programme.desc: Nadine Hazel wants to raise money for two very different building projects.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Taylor
programme.desc: Jill Taylor of Wrexham needs cash to furnish her mum's retirement home.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Godfrey
programme.desc: Solicitor Gwen Godfrey wants to raise cash for charity and a family spa treat.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Leyland
programme.desc: John Leyland needs 1000 pounds to restore his beloved Ford Consul.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Askham
programme.desc: Ann and Tony Askham hope their collectables will fund a new porch and access ramp.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Ruskin
programme.desc: Lesley and Phil Ruskin want to take a cruise, which will cost around 2000 pounds.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Phillips
programme.desc: In Cambridgeshire, Stuart and Phillippa Phillips want to raise 500 pounds.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Stevens
programme.desc: Jeannie Stevens enlist help to raise some cash from items such as a bone china tea set.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Sturdy
programme.desc: Shirley Sturdy and her best friend are looking to take a motor caravan holiday.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Ross
programme.desc: Lorne and Jonty help sisters to motivate their 85-year-old father to sell mementos.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Hansen
programme.desc: Vivian Hansen wants to treat his family to a great day out in London.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Scott
programme.desc: Diana Scott wants to raise 800 pounds to pay for a luxury cruise.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Devine
programme.desc: Linda and John Devine want to raise 300 pounds to buy their grandchild some presents.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Hawes
programme.desc: Brenda Hawes wants to raise money to convert her garage into a playroom.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Hughes
programme.desc: Fundraiser Kay wants to raise 500 pounds to support people with spinal cord injuries.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robin & Daniel, both want custody of daughters, Dani, 14, & Zoey, 12, who've been torn between both parents for years. What will happen to Dani and Zoey? Find out as we meet the whole family,to see if they are ready to receive help and move forward.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Aja says she is tired of caring for her entitled, drug-addicted mother, Janet, by allowing her to live with her for 8 of 10 years of her own marriage. Aja cites costs of $100,000. Janet rejects: she pays rent & regularly goes to Narcotics Anonymous.
programme.sub-title: My Mooching Mom Cost Me $100K & Needs To Get Out Of My House

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brad has been having an affair with his wife's ex-best friend and says he's torn between saving his family or being with his girlfriend. Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Anita, 73, married to the CEO of fast food restaurant chain Wendy's, is a felon, convicted of scamming friends & employees out of a half million dollars. Anita said she was duped by Ohio State, NFL quarterback, Art Schlichter. Victim or co-conspirator?
programme.sub-title: Wife Of Top Restaurant Exec: Scammed By Famous Football Star

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meet three women ready to divorce controlling, chauvinistic husbands. At Dr. Phil's Man Camp, an intensive week-long stay in The Dr. Phil House, can these couples repair the damage from their toxic attitudes, explosive fights and abusive behaviors? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Blake, 26, is a college graduate and on the dean's list with a 3.5 GPA. He has thrown it away to sit around and smoke pot in the rent-free house his mom supplied. He has aspirations, like stripping off his shirt to show off his self-professed buff body.
programme.sub-title: Bad Boy Blake With Abs Of Steel

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents are bombarded with the dangers kids can fall prey: molesters, cyber-stalkers, drugs & bullies. But how far to go to ensure your child's safety? Where do you draw the line between hovering over your children & giving them enough freedom?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Elsa says she was abused daily & beaten with ropes, chains, whips & umbrellas by the people she thought were her adoptive parents, Joe and his wife, Evangeline. Elsa says the abuse lasted for 19 years until an unlikely person stepped up to rescue her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues an incredible story of a woman brutally raped at age 15. Loretta identified the alleged rapist and helped police put him behind bars. But her world was rocked 14 years later when the man, Dean, was exonerated due to DNA evidence. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Could You Be An Eyewitness? Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The tense family drama continues. Dr. Phil sent Private Investigator Harold Copus thousands of miles through three countries including the jungles of Belize to find two sisters, Allene and Mollie, who were abducted by their father one year ago. Part 3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom, Vicki, has been married to Marissa's dad, Robert, for 34 years. Marissa discovered her dad was having an "affair" and visiting "porn" and "call girl" websites. Robert, a former pastor, admits a relationship, but insists he's a victim.
programme.sub-title: The Pastor, His Wife, The Call Girl And The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Every parent can tell you that raising a child is often demanding, thankless, hard work. But when a teenager gets pregnant and has a child, the result can be stress and chaos.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with the family of Amy, "Mother God", who says she can heal the world with her group, Love Has Won. The family alleges that Amy is a brainwashed "cult leader" and she is putting other people's lives at risk. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Mother God's Followers And Alleged Victims Face Off Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Richard says his 6-yr marriage to Kelli ended due to her obsession with "stuff"! The couple, divorced now 12 yrs, is considering re-marriage but only if Kelli stops hoarding. You won't believe what producers saw & found when the home was tested for mold.
programme.sub-title: Hoarding Ultimatum: Your Junk Or Me!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trust has been ranked as the #1 crucial quality for a happy marriage. Deanne & Brian have been married for 12 years with four children between them. Now, due to alleged lies and infidelity, their family is torn apart and divorce is just a signature away.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil follows up with Charles and Tracy. After coming to the conclusion that his dream of being shared by his wife and mistress was never going to happen, did Charles follow through and end his relationship with the other woman? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you and your beloved say "I do," it's "for better or worse." But what happens when all you feel is the "worse" part and wind up trapped in a bad marriage?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Brian, Liz, & Bethany. Now former friend Sarah says she lies as her "real" life is "not very exciting." Michelle, who is a cancer survivor and former friend of Sarah's, confronts Sarah for the first time. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Liar, Liar: Sarah Faces Her Accusers Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his mission to end the silence on domestic violence. More than 25 percent of battered women remain in a relationship with their abuser. Sonya fears that she is one of those women who stay. Hear her story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer claims her family has been the victim of hackers for 2 years. The problem is her husband, Billy, thinks she is the hacker! Things are so bad that Billy has asked for a divorce. Jennifer says she wants to clear her name & save her marriage! Pt.1
programme.sub-title: My Husband Thinks I Hacked Our Devices: Clear My Name Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget says she's not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace. Dr. Phil sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions? Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Uncle Kevin Answers The Accusations Pt.2

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: The famed killer was not alone in England's scourge of murders.

programme.title: Inside Britain's Black Market: Who's Selling Fake Stuff
programme.desc: Investigative reporter Livvy Haydock aims to find out why the Black Market is running so rampant.

programme.title: Murdered on Honeymoon
programme.desc: Newlywed Anni Dewani had just begun her honeymoon in Cape Town when she was abruptly kidnapped and murdered.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorious: The Shocking Release
programme.desc: Learn about Reeva Steenkamp's murder at the hands of her boyfriend, Paralympian runner Oscar Pistorius.

programme.title: Jonestown: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: The murder and suicides of over 900 of Jim Jones's followers was the culmination of years of indoctrination.

programme.title: Great Bank Heists
programme.desc: This film examines three of the most incredible and ingenious robberies of all time

programme.title: Inside Britain's Black Market: Who's Selling Fake Stuff
programme.desc: Investigative reporter Livvy Haydock aims to find out why the Black Market is running so rampant.

programme.title: Revealed Jack the Ripper: Tabloid Killer
programme.desc: A closer look at history reveals how Jack the Ripper could have been fabricated for readers.

programme.title: Mommy, My Killer

programme.title: Killer Doctor: The Harold Shipman Case

programme.title: The Family: Inside The Manson Cult
programme.desc: The notorious villain Charles Manson transformed a harmless group of hippies into a gang of brutal murderers.

programme.title: Murder in Paradise
programme.desc: British backpackers were found dead. Never-before-seen evidence sheds new light on this global news story.

programme.title: Raped in Custody
programme.desc: Investigate claims that some American law enforcement officers used their positions of power to assault women.

programme.title: Lady Killers with Martina Cole
programme.desc: A vicious killer who kept it in the family.

programme.title: Lady Killers with Martina Cole
programme.desc: Making the tabloids for all the wrong reasons.

programme.title: Lady Killers with Martina Cole
programme.desc: You wouldn't want to fall behind on your rent with this landlord.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The shop has its hands full restoring a 1942 Ford truck that needed a lot of TLC and a special touch for the owner's wife. Danny and Ryan check out a badass 1929 Ford Roadster.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny scores a pimp-tastic 1967 Impala, but when it's time to hand over the keys to an important client Danny doesn't think he can let her go.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Legendary rocker George Lynch from the metal band Dokken stops by with his very cool 1965 Buick Riviera.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: "Engine Whisperer" Doc has a cool '67 Firebird he's been working on. While he's a mechanical maestro under the hood, his paint skills are lacking so he enlists Ryan.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Pawn Stars Rick Harrison shows up to give the guys of Count s Kustoms the project of a lifetime.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Scott bugs out when he learns Danny's invested in a vintage dune buggy. Will Danny prove Scott wrong and flip this sand shredder for some serious dough?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Get revved up when Danny spots a killer 1967 Pontiac GTO at one of the biggest car shows in Vegas.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Trouble finds Danny when he makes a reckless buy at an auction. Will a hunk of junk force him to finally admit defeat?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Tasked with building a custom bike for a disabled man, Danny and his team must figure out a way to tackle a tricky transformation.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny may be in over his head when he takes on his first boat. Will he be able to tread through the rough waters or will he be forced to abandon ship?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny is visited by legendary Mistress of the Dark, Elvira, whose famous Thunderbird is in need of some mechanical magic.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and Kevin find themselves in hot water when a motorcycle pullover goes south. Later, a woman brings in her recovered IROC-Z and leaves with a genius thief-busting solution.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and Shannon honor fallen troops with a custom patriotic motorcycle. Later, Danny and Kevin push the limit to acquire a `71 Monte Carlo, and then have a tough decision to make when a heart-broken customer can't pay up.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin and Horny Mike make an unauthorized purchase, forcing Danny to teach them a valuable lesson. Later, Danny runs into trouble himself after acquiring a Chevelle the shop doesn't have room for.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny takes on his most emotional project yet after spotting a 70 Dodge Challenger on a private road. Later, Kevin s lunch is interrupted by a rare 63 Corvette, while Horny Mike and Roli get lost cruising in a clunker.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Horny Mike discovers a coveted bike frame on private property and convinces Danny to risk it all by sneaking inside. Later, Scott is miffed by a last-minute creative change that is guaranteed to cost the shop big money.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny is commissioned by Barry White's estate to find and restore the legendary singer's Stutz IV Porte. Meanwhile, an old pullover visits the shop with a custom job that could teach The Count a lesson.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny gets sidetracked by a curious lady in a hot pink Beetle while trying to score a classic Ford Galaxie. Later, a Hollywood icon confronts Horny Mike and Roli in the shop parking lot. Will Danny be able to diffuse the situation before it explodes?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny's friend Brian has always wanted to ride a motorcycle but has never been able due to his physical limitations. Will Danny and the guys be able to get Brian in the wind for the first time?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and Horny Mike get too close for comfort when they convince a Model-T Hot Rod owner to let them take it for a spin. Later, a Soap Box race car brings out the inner child in Roli and Mike.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny conspires with a proud dad to give the ultimate surprise 16th birthday gift, and the shop frustrates a customer with a design error on a scaled-down commemorative Model T Firetruck.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Count's Kustoms speeds to the rescue after Kevin's son encounters trouble on the race track. Danny stumbles upon an extremely rare 1979 Dodge Dreamer.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and the boys give away a perfect hot rod at the annual Rockabilly Reunion at Lake Havasu. Later, a lady biker stuns the boys with a custom order for the bike of her dreams.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Last year, Count's Kustoms helped Shane surprise his fiance Tanya with a customized classic pick-up truck. This year she's returning the favor, but will the shop be able to return Shane's prized 1970 Mustang to its former glory.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny finds a rare 1960 delivery vehicle to show off at the Viva Vegas car show, and after Mike gets in trouble at work, the guys decide to build Danny a customized coffin couch.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin is won over by a hotrod pick-up truck, Danny tracks down a customer's original 1969 Firebird but its terrible condition may make it impossible to restore, and an unannounced visitor causes drama at the shop.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Emotions run deep when Danny receives an astronomical offer for one of his prized cars. Kevin helps spot an epic flip that brings in a ton of cash and the guys visit SEMA, the world's biggest and most extravagant auto show.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Chumlee from Gold & Silver stops by to pick up his custom 1963 Lincoln, but gets some really bad news instead. Later a casino VIP commissions a bike inspired by the largest chunk of gold in the world.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The shop agrees to build a brave father a hot rod wheelchair, and Danny gets stuck in a bind when a pink car project doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin's brother is a judge, but that won't get him a free ride, and the guys struggle to finish his '62 Chevy pick-up within budget. Later, Scott spots an incredibly rare Corvette, but will he screw up the deal without Danny's help?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The shop has its hands full with a custom psychedelic bike, and Danny's infamous friend.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has a last-minute change of heart and can't let go of a classic car he promised to sell to a loyal customer.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny builds an extra special car for a customer who wants something no one else has--a tribute car of the rare Yenko Nova. Later, he visits one of the world's most exclusive car collections to find a car for a client with very expensive taste.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Ziggy Marley meets Danny at Vamp'd to commission a restoration on his father, Bob Marley's, vintage Mercedes.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck as the shop rushes to finish restoring the last car Bob Marley ever owned. They must hustle to deliver it to Ziggy Marley in LA while Horny Mike takes on a dangerous side project with teeth.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny tries to score an ex-police motorcycle without getting busted, while a water main break threatens to put the shop permanently underwater. Will Danny be able to get the shop back up and running, or will it be a complete washout?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny discovers the rarest Cadillac collection he's ever seen. Later, Horny Mike has 30 days to move his big ugly bus.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has no interest in a rubber-to-roof restoration on a '73 Chevy Blazer until he hears that it's a tribute to the owner's nephew.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin and Roli make an unplanned stop to check out a mysteriously small vehicle. And later, Danny gets a call from Rob Zombie who wants to customize a truck for his upcoming tour.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The Geordies reach boiling point... Marty tries to make it up to Chloe, but will she forgive him? And is there any way back for Aaron and Marnie after the previous night's break up? (S13, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: In the series finale Chloe and Marty get flirty again, but can they really stay just good friends? Kyle gets some big news from Boss Anna, but the fallout will change the family forever. (S13, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The Geordies are back! Big Boss Anna shocks the Squad when she sends in some new workers to join them. The lads are excited but Sophie and Chloe aren’t so sure and things quickly go west. (S14, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Aaron and Marty decide to get close to newbies Sarah and Abbie. After her kick-off with Zahida, Chloe gets some big news. And the family is stunned when two more new workers arrive. (S14, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie could give birth at any moment. Sophie opens up to Holly about her heartbreak. Chester gives Gary the run around and Aaron faces up to the reality of becoming a Dad. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Gary plans a life-changing surprise for Emma. Holly goes to see some unicorns. Sophie struggles to forget her ex and Marnie has a traumatic labour. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Sophie gets ready to celebrate her 30th birthday in style. Marnie adjusts to her new life. Holly takes Jacob shopping and Gary prepares to go down on one knee. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie's illness catches up with her. Gary takes Aaron "Dad training" and Sophie receives some devastating news. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron gets called out at an MMA fight. Marnie is finally ready to have visitors and Holly and Jacob throw an epic engagement party. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron takes up golf with hilarious results. Sophie makes a life changing purchase. Holly has a fitness photo shoot and Marnie & Casey have their first date since Rox's birth. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly prepares to meet one of her trolls. Gary and Emma's second baby arrives early. Sophie shows off her new house and Marnie & Casey fall out at the pool. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron welcomes his son into the world, but there's some bad news for his relationship. Holly takes a trip to secure a wedding venue and Marnie sees her mum for the first time since lockdown. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: After leaving Geordie Shore; Aaron, Marnie and Holly continue their journey through adult life. No more shots & kebabs, it's all about wedding planning, changing nappies and being grown ups. (S3, ep2)
programme.sub-title: I'm Sexy and I Know It

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: A hospital visit thaws tensions between Aaron and Talia. Holly goes shopping for bridesmaid dresses and Casey hatches a plan behind Marnie's back. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron meets Talia to try and save their relationship. Holly goes on the hunt for her wedding dress and Casey is nearly ready to pop the question... there's just one thing missing. (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly debates taking Jacob's name, Aaron and Talia have couples counselling and the time has come for Casey to propose to Marnie. Will he hold his nerve? (S3, ep5)
programme.sub-title: I Think I Wanna Marry You

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie's illness takes a dramatic turn for the worse, Aaron and Talia make a massive step in the right direction and Holly hits the hat shop with her mam. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie and Casey return to the scene of an old argument. Aaron hits the dirt bike track and Holly comes face to face with the past at her hen party. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: The OGs are back but will Aaron and Talia's relationship survive a new baby? Will Marnie and Casey stay strong after a recent split? Will Holly and Jacob ever get married? (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie plans some big life goals. Holly finds her dream home, but will she get a mortgage? Sophie realises her friends are moving on but she isn't. Aaron goes all out for Talia's birthday. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: JAG: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: Harm serves as a judge and Mac is the contentious prosecutor in a case fraught withpolitical implications when an American aviator is charged with killing three Britishsoldiers during a flight mission in Afghanistan.

programme.title: JAG: Shifting Sands
programme.desc: When a Gulf War MIA victim is found as the sheik’s wife in a nomadic Arab tribe, Bud prosecutes and Mac defends her against charges of desertion and, in a stunning turn of events, treason. Harm tries to get his old job back but is turned away.

programme.title: JAG: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Mac defends and Turner prosecutes in the case of a special op marine who, during an Iraqi mission, may have deserted his team for his own survival. Harm takes on a CIA training assignment in a mach six craft that soon has him in danger.

programme.title: JAG: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Back at JAG, Harm is flooded with cases but still wants to help out an 80-year-old veteran accused of robbery. Meanwhile, Turner takes on an assignment in a sub whose crew has rescued possible defecting North Koreans.

programme.title: JAG: Posse Comitatus
programme.desc: Harm and Mac argue the case of a Marine pilot who used force to interfere with a local police matter that led to a man’s killing. Roberts is the investigating officer in the matter of a Navy doctor who is requesting conscientious objector status.

programme.title: JAG: The Boast
programme.desc: When an unwitting corporal boasts to a reporter that he killed an Iraqi prisoner of war, facts begin to emerge that could convict him despite his later claim that he was only lying toi mpress.

programme.title: JAG: Pulse Rate
programme.desc: Harm and Mac go aboard the USS Gillcrist to determine if a seaman’s fatal accident during a routine repair was the result of a co-worker’s dereliction of duty or worse.

programme.title: JAG: Good Intentions
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: JAG: People vs SECNAV
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG: Coming Home
programme.desc: A marine’s killing in Iraq has ramifications for JAG stateside as Harm helps the soldier’s family with a media onslaught, and Bud and Mac investigate the failure of his flack vest.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: JAG: One Big Boat
programme.desc: When a Naval Academy sailing team gets caught in a squall and a team member drowns, Mac and Turner must determine if their driven commander willingly put his crew at risk.

programme.title: JAG: Death At The Mosque
programme.desc: Vukovic is sent to Iraq to defend a Marine who was caught on tape killing a seemingly innocent Iraqi civilian.

programme.title: JAG: Dream Team
programme.desc: A sailor dies during a fight aboard a ship at sea; Bud discovers the explanation. Mattie wakes up and talks. The general announces a reorganization, orders, and a promotion.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot, Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: A woman radar-intercept officer (RIO) disappears at night from an aircraft carrier in the Adriatic Sea. Two JAG lawyers, Lt. Harm Rabb and Lt. Caitlin Pike, investigate and solve. Harm, a former Naval aviator, unexpectedly becomes a hero.

programme.title: JAG: Shadow
programme.desc: A civilian tech rep aboard a submarine seizes control of an experimental torpedo after its launch during an exercise

programme.title: JAG: déjà vu (AKA Soldier of Love)
programme.desc: Three Navy lieutenants die by homicide in 11 months around Washington. Harm and Meg investigate

programme.title: JAG: Desert Son
programme.desc: Due to a human error in an exercise, artillery fire injures seven Marines, one of whom later dies.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Stop Sticks are used to end the pursuit of a man that Deputies have previously arrested. Two ghost guns are recovered during a traffic stop. Sisters argue over access to their elderly mother.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Dishonest Dudes
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: COPS: Dangerous Toppings
programme.desc: A jaywalker with no id bolts away from an officer. A man mixes illicit items with his pizza. A woman involved in a domestic violence call blames her monthly issues.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Sittin' in the Dark
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bachelorette party is rescued from a sinking boat. A group of spring breakers is forced to pour out liquor. A man is caught selling beer from a backpack. A boiled peanut vendor drifts toward danger.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Bikini Brawl
programme.desc: Officers are called when a mother's job hunt takes a turn for the worse, and deputies confront a nervous man with a lot of bad habits.

programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: COPS starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.
