programme.title: The Love Boat: Isaac The Marriage Counselor / The Incredible Hunk/Jewels And Jim
programme.desc: The ship shudders when an entertainer hired by Julie turns out to be an exotic dancer and he doesn't want his secret revealed. Meanwhile, Isaac learns that a former passenger misunderstood his advice and divorced his wife.
programme.sub-title: Isaac The Marriage Counselor / The Incredible Hunk/Jewels And Jim

programme.title: The Love Boat: Take A Letter Vicky / The Floating Bridge Game/ The Joy Of Celibacy
programme.desc: An emotionally cold woman finds herself falling for a Romeo with hot ideas. Meanwhile, a widow's romance with an attractive dentist is hindered by her nosy, card-playing companions (Rose Marie, Jan Clayton, and Lucille Benson).
programme.sub-title: Take A Letter Vicky / The Floating Bridge Game/ The Joy Of Celibacy

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Viking's Son / Love Boat - Pride Of The Pacific/ Separate Vacations/ The Experiment - Part 2
programme.desc: An emotionally cold woman finds herself falling for a Romeo with hot ideas. Meanwhile, a widow's romance with an attractive dentist is hindered by her nosy, card-playing companions (Rose Marie, Jan Clayton, and Lucille Benson).
programme.sub-title: The Viking's Son / Love Boat - Pride Of The Pacific/ Separate Vacations/ The Experiment - Part 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: Good Neighbors / Captain's Portrait/ Familiar Faces
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing develops an unusual relationship with a lovely woman who is tasked with painting his portrait.
programme.sub-title: Good Neighbors / Captain's Portrait/ Familiar Faces

programme.title: The Love Boat: I Don't Play Anymore / Gopher's Roommate/ Crazy For You
programme.desc: Gopher is shocked when he finds his old college roommate is different than he remembers. At the same time, an embittered and retired pianist agrees to perform again in order to pay for a handicapped woman's surgery.
programme.sub-title: I Don't Play Anymore / Gopher's Roommate/ Crazy For You

programme.title: The Love Boat: Green, But Not Jolly / Past Perfect Love/ Instant Family
programme.desc: A man falls in love with a beautiful woman who believes the couple was married in a past life 100 years earlier. The crew's amusement at Julie's new hairstyle creates pandemonium.
programme.sub-title: Green, But Not Jolly / Past Perfect Love/ Instant Family

programme.title: The Love Boat: Isaac Gets Physical / She Brought Her Mother Along/ Cold Feet
programme.desc: A female doctor's temperature rises when she meets Isaac, who tries to avoid his physical exam so he can hide a congenital condition. Meanwhile, a young woman and her mother learn devastating truths about each other when they meet the daughter's fiance.
programme.sub-title: Isaac Gets Physical / She Brought Her Mother Along/ Cold Feet

programme.title: The Love Boat: Burl Of My Dreams / Meet The Author/ Rhymes, Riddles And Romance
programme.desc: While the captain's daughter falls for Gopher, a book publisher flips a page in the book of love when trying to sign a burly author who happens to be accompanied by his attractive niece. Plus, an unusual couple looks for treasure.
programme.sub-title: Burl Of My Dreams / Meet The Author/ Rhymes, Riddles And Romance

programme.title: The Love Boat: His Girl Friday / A Wife For Wilfred/ The Girl Who Stood Still
programme.desc: Crew members become matchmakers when a man offers a handsome reward to anyone who can find him a good woman. Plus, a teen girl traveling with her mother faces potential humiliation when she runs into a former boyfriend.
programme.sub-title: His Girl Friday / A Wife For Wilfred/ The Girl Who Stood Still

programme.title: The Love Boat: Pali-Mony-O-Mine / Does Father Know Best?/ An 'A' For Gopher
programme.desc: A doctor and his lawyer girlfriend find their relationship on trial when he meets an old friend. Meanwhile, Gopher flips for his former schoolteacher, and a young man tries to impress his father when he meets two women.
programme.sub-title: Pali-Mony-O-Mine / Does Father Know Best?/ An 'A' For Gopher

programme.title: The Love Boat: Mothers Don't Do That / Marrying For Money/ Substitute Lover
programme.desc: The captain and his crew suspect that a beautiful woman is trying to kill her millionaire husband, while a glamorous divorcee (Eva Gabor) tries to get reacquainted with her son, who prefers the company of his father.
programme.sub-title: Mothers Don't Do That / Marrying For Money/ Substitute Lover

programme.title: The Love Boat: Command Performance/ Sketchy Love/ Hyde And Seek
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are shocked to see the girl's long-lost father entertaining passengers as the cruise comedian. Plus, a teenager pursues Gopher and drastically changes her appearance to try and catch his eye.
programme.sub-title: Command Performance/ Sketchy Love/ Hyde And Seek

programme.title: The Love Boat: Doc's Big Case/ Senior Sinners/ Abooming Romance
programme.desc: When a former medical-school friend (James Noble) becomes the center of attention, Doc wonders if he made the right career decision. Meanwhile, a reticent computer genius tries to win the affection of a woman who has eyes for another man
programme.sub-title: Doc's Big Case/ Senior Sinners/ Abooming Romance

programme.title: The Love Boat: Going To The Dogs / Women'S Best Friend / Whose Dog Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing and his crew host passengers and their pooches for the Honeycutt $10.000 Dog Show competition commencing in Acapulco.
programme.sub-title: Going To The Dogs / Women'S Best Friend / Whose Dog Is It Anyway?

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Spoonmaker Diamond - Part 1
programme.desc: A famous diamond is stolen from a museum in Istanbul just as the Pacific Princess is sailing the Aegean Sea. Doc proposes marriage to a beautiful woman who is more interested in someone else.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Spoonmaker Diamond - Part 2
programme.desc: Romance and intrigue combine with the mystery of a famous international jewel as The Love Boat sails amid the scenic beauty of the Aegean Sea - including the glorious sights of the Greek Islands and Turkey.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Venetian Love Song - Part 1
programme.desc: While the Pacific Princess sails through the beautiful waters of Italy, a seemingly happy couple (Shelly Winters and Ernest Borgnine) reveals that their relationship is far from perfect.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Crazy Love
programme.desc: Sydney resents Jane's new relationship with her mother. Sherry lies about the identity of Jane's biological father but later reveals that he was a producer with whom she had slept with to win a part.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Accidental Doctor
programme.desc: Michael tries to reunite Peter and Amanda in the hopes that Peter will again make a contribution at the office. Kyle tries to play matchmaker at his birthday party, but Amanda isn't ready to talk to Peter.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Escape from L. A.
programme.desc: Michael signs the divorce papers and marries Megan during their trip to Las Vegas. Peter learns that Kimberly has a brain tumor, and breaks the news to Michael. Jane is robbed at gunpoint at the boutique.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Eyes of the Storm
programme.desc: Michael insists on spending time with Kimberly after learning of her terminal illness. She reveals to Megan that she will crash her car during the next rainstorm.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Better Homes and Condos
programme.desc: Kimberly pulls Michael from the wrecked vehicle while Megan calls for help. Michael experiences internal bleeding and flatlines.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Catch Her in a Lie
programme.desc: Megan is furious to learn that Michael has slept with Kimberly. She forgives Michael, but then stakes out the beach house and nearly runs over Kimberly.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Men are From Melrose
programme.desc: Nick follows Taylor to Peter's house and witnesses a romantic encounter. He later photographs the couple's late-night rendezvous at a golf course. Megan discovers that Kimberly's illness is in remission.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Frames R Us
programme.desc: Nick drops hints about the photos to Peter. Taylor drugs Nick while Peter removes the pictures from his apartment. When Kyle arrives home, Taylor pretends that Nick is attacking her.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Screams From A Marriage
programme.desc: Amanda rejects Craig, who seeks a relationship after their night together. Kyle realizes that Taylor has been lying to him.

programme.title: Melrose Place: 101 Damnations
programme.desc: Michael takes Megan back after learning that she has returned to the streets. A woman sues Sydney after she is injured by a display at the boutique.

programme.title: Melrose Place: From Here to Maternity
programme.desc: Kimberly collapses during an argument with Michael. She learns that she has an aneurysm, but refuses to undergo surgery.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Last Exit to Ohio
programme.desc: Kimberly's mother and Michael argue when Mrs. Shaw announces her intention to take her daughter back to Cleveland. Michael insists that Kimberly is too weak to travel.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Dead Wives Club
programme.desc: Jake and Alison hit the road in the hopes of finding a place to get married. Their car breaks down in a small town, where they eventually tie the knot.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Deja Vu All Over Again
programme.desc: Sydney suffers broken ribs and a separated shoulder in her fall, but her pain is eased when she learns that she could receive five million dollars. Craig tells Amanda that he will take care of the lawsuit by seducing Sydney.

programme.title: Melrose Place: All Beths are Off
programme.desc: While having lunch with Megan, Jennifer hears Kyle's voice. She slaps him. Kyle visits her at the beach house and apologizes for the way he broke off their Boston affair.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Ultimatums and the Single Girl
programme.desc: Amanda and Kyle seek divorces so that their spouses can't get a cut of the jazz club. Sydney decides to give up her lawsuit for a $50,000 settlement because she doesn't want to hurt Craig.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Going Places
programme.desc: Michael decides to convince Peter that he has a disease called rage epilepsy. He and Taylor drug Peter, then tell him that he struck Taylor during a blackout.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Secrets and Lies, And More Lies
programme.desc: The jazz club celebrates its grand opening. Amanda pushes Kyle away after he hires Jennifer as a bartender. Sydney undermines Amanda's authority at D&D.
programme.sub-title: Secrets and Lies, And More Lies

programme.title: Melrose Place: Who's Afraid of Amanda Woodward
programme.desc: Sydney and Craig decide to quit D&D and start their own agency. They steal all of D&D's clients and employees. Syd and Craig get engaged. A panicked Amanda tries to back out of the jazz club, as she needs the money to keep her agency afloat.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: My Nightmare The Car

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Fear Strikes Up A Conversation

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Disney World

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Choice
programme.desc: After her aunts decide to go their separate ways, Sabrina has to choose which of the two should raise her.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Boy Was My Face Red
programme.desc: An embarrassing moment leaves Sabrina red in the face.

programme.desc: Sabrina learns she has to solve the family secret before she can use her Witches License.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Suspicious Minds

programme.desc: An addiction to pancakes threatens to send Sabrina’s life spinning out of control.

programme.desc: A spell to get her just desserts leaves Sabrina with egg on her face instead.

programme.desc: In order to teach Sabrina a lesson about love and beauty, Harvey is turned into a beast.

programme.desc: Sabrina’s charitable magic turns out to be anything but a good deed.

programme.desc: It’s Valentine’s Day, and Sabrina must help two people fall in love or suffer Cupid’s wrath.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies jump out to say "Eh-oh" before watching a girl paint a picture of her dad. A voice trumpet rises and sings the nursery rhyme Looby Loo, the Tubbies join in and dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to say "Meow". The Tubbies watch three boys play with their new kittens. A voice trumpet rises and announces that it is 'Time to get up.' But the Teletubbies are too tired and go back to bed.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two children looking through a telescope at the moon. In Teletubbyland, Po is going round and round.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It’s time for Tubby Toast. Dipsy and Laa-Laa are so excited, they bounce up and down on their seats so much they fall off. They sit up to watch some children watching some birds in a bird bath.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po counts to three. The Teletubbies watch Sam have a ride in a helicopter. Laa-Laa's ball gets stuck up a tree and three magic ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies join in with the game when a voice trumpet sings the Grand Old Duke of York. The magic windmill brings a musical transmission featuring King Pleasure and The Biscuit Boys.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children visit a Sealife centre to look at seahorses. The Teletubbies go looking for interesting things. Tinky Winky sees his reflection in a puddle. Dipsy sees different clouds.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance around the trees and watch some children drum with their friend Norris. Tinky Winky dance on the roof of Home Hill and wakes up the other Tubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some girls live with their Mum and Dad on a boat. They show us inside the boat. The Teletubbies come out of the house. Tinky Winky and Po go left and Dipsy and Laa-Laa go right.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little girl make some Bagels with her uncle. It’s time for Tubby Custard. Laa-Laa sits down to eat her Tubby Custard, but she waits for Po.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and Amber look for some ladybirds. Tinky Winky, Dipsy & Laa-Laa decide to go high up. Tinky Winky walks to the top of the path.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy comes out of the house, but has to go back in to fetch the other Tubbies. They watch some children picking oranges. Laa-Laa plays with her ball indoors, but it gets stuck.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two children climb a church tower to watch their mums ring the church bells. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po each sing a special song into Tinky Winky's bag, but when he drops his bag their songs make a lovely new mixed up song.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children go for a walk to find some red squirrels. The Teletubbies are playing a hiding game. Where are they? Can Noo-Noo find them?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa and Po make some adjustments on the switch panel and laugh at the funny noises. The Tubbies watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty duck.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little girl and her sister getting ready to go away for a day. Tinky Winky puts all the Teletubbies favourite things into his bag.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk and have fun saying hello to Tinky Winky and Po. The Teletubbies watch Alex Pascall share the story of the 'Owl Babies' with some children.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It’s very windy in Teletubbyland. The wind blows Tinky Winky’s skirt, Dipsy’s hat, Laa-Laa’s ball and Po off her scooter.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children looking at penguins waddling and swimming. In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies are walking. They walk fast and slow, far and near and other different ways.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take turns to stand on a hill, in front of the house, next to a tree under a cloud. Andy Brown and some children visit some giraffes.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa comes out of the house does a little dance and calls the other Teletubbies for a Big Hug. They stop to watch 2 little girls making a pretend friend, out of old clothes.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are running around the house, but stop to see some children visit a level crossing and watch a train pass by. The Teletubbies play their Ready, Steady, Go game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch some children play a game with their fingers. A voice trumpet rises and sings the nursery rhyme ‘Ring-a-Roses’ to the Teletubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are playing with their favourite things, they stop to watch an international Christmas insert. Lots of clouds appear in Teletubbyland and begin to snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind a hill to watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty sausage.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love dancing, but everything stops when the Teletubbies watch a little boy making drinking chocolate. There's time before Tubby Custard before three magic ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa makes some adjustments on the switch panel. The Teletubbies watch Sam and his mum blow some long horns.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Philpotts
programme.desc: When six children died in a house fire in Allenton, Derby in May 2012 it shocked the nation. Parents Mick and Mairead Philpott were charged with the murders. We uncover the reasons behind the arson attack on their own home.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin is one of the most notorious serial killers in the UK. From 1991–2006 he raped and murdered three young girls; Dinah McNicol, Vicky Hamilton and Angelika Kluk. Yet even prior to these horrific murders he had a history of violence.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Gemma McCluskie
programme.desc: The harrowing story of EastEnders actress Gemma McCluskie, who was murdered by her older brother in the flat they shared in east London in 2012.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers
programme.desc: Rochdale Groomers: Documentary examining the sex abuse scandal which occurred in the North of England and appeared to go undetected for quite some time.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Joanne Dennehy
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan returns to uncover the truth behind the horrific crimes of Peterborough serial killer Joanna Dennehy.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Wrongly Released
programme.desc: This special episode shines a light on criminals who have been brought to justice for one crime only to be released to commit further terrible acts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Dunblane Massacre
programme.desc: In an emotional tribute, witnesses and victims' relatives look back on the tragic murder of 16 children and a teacher at Dunblane Primary School in Scotland, 15 years ago.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The London Nail Bombings
programme.desc: London was brought to a standstill in April 1999 when 23-year-old political extremist David Copeland caused terror with a bombing campaign.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Jill Dando
programme.desc: Documentary examining the unsolved murder of British TV presenter and newsreader Jill Dando, who was shot outside her house in Fulham, London, in 1999.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Beverly Allitt
programme.desc: Beverley Allitt was thought to be a 'model' nurse. Very astute, caring and always willing to help, why did she murder four children and attempt to kill 11 others?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephen Port
programme.desc: A chilling look at the crimes of Stephen Port, the east London serial killer who poisoned four young men with lethal doses of a date rape drug.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Christopher Foster
programme.desc: Failed businessman Christopher Foster killed his wife and daughter before burning their mansion in Shropshire to the ground in August 2008.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stepping Hill
programme.desc: An inside look at the series of mysterious deaths that occurred at Stepping Hill Hospital in Stockport, Greater Manchester, in 2011.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephanie Slater
programme.desc: Estate agent Stephanie Slater reveals the story of her abduction, rape and incarceration, which occurred in 1992 whilst showing a man around a house.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Manchester
programme.desc: The series returns to take a closer look at the most horrific crimes ever committed on British soil, starting with the May 2017 Manchester Arena bombing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Sutcliffe
programme.desc: Arguably Britain's most infamous serial killer, Peter Sutcliffe became known as The Yorkshire Ripper when he began murdering women in Yorkshire during the 1970s.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rose West
programme.desc: With her husband Fred, Rose West brutally murdered ten girls between 1973 and 1979, making her one of the most high profile serial killers in the UK.

programme.title: Girlfriends: A Full Court Conspiracy
programme.desc: Torn between her two worlds, Joan struggles with her professional duty while at the same time dealing with the guilt that she is not being true to herself or her beliefs.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Un-Treatable
programme.desc: Maya buys a dress that is too expensive knowing it might cause problems with her husband, Darnell. Joan treats herself to a trip to New York to visit her boyfriend, realizing the distance between the two of them is a problem.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Buh-Bye
programme.desc: Joan ends the friendship between her and Toni after finding out that Toni has been discussing her personal life with co-workers behind her back. Meanwhile, Lynn is trying to cope with her new living situation with Vosco, and his lack of a job.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Willie or Won’t He
programme.desc: Yvonne is concerned that William is never going to marry her because they have not set a date for the wedding. When Yvonne asks Joan for advice, Joan tries her best to stay out of it but ends up telling Yvonne to move in with William first to try it out.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Joan’s Birthday Suit
programme.desc: For her thirtieth birthday, Joan finds that she is happy with who she is, yet finds that she’s not so happy that her father is a nudist.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Trick or Truth?
programme.desc: When Toni loses her friend Joan, her man, and her gold card, it’s up to Maya and Lynn to help her get her life back together.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Maya Takes a Stan
programme.desc: Due to marital tensions at home, an emotionally fragile Maya finds herself falling into a fantasy affair with a handsome and empathetic new friend, Stan.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Mom’s the Word
programme.desc: Toni meets a great man but is dumped after she’s a bad influence on his eight-year-old daughter. Joan dates a movie star but is dumped when he begins to think she’s stalking him.

programme.title: Girlfriends: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: Maya refuses to end her relationship with Stan, despite her girlfriends' repeated warnings to do so.

programme.title: Girlfriends: I Have a Dream House
programme.desc: As a gesture of his love, William buys a beautiful house for his fiance, Yvonne.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Sister, Sistah
programme.desc: Lynn's Caucasian sister, Tanya, travels to LA to help Lynn celebrate her Gotcha Day: the day when Lynn's childhood adoption to her Caucasian family became legal.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Willie or Won’t He II: The Last Chapter
programme.desc: The week of William and Yvonne's wedding is finally here and all goes smoothly until Yvonne discovers William never told his mother about Yvonne...ever.
programme.sub-title: Willie or Won’t He II: The Last Chapter

programme.title: Girlfriends: Can’t Stan Ya
programme.desc: After a horrid kiss, Maya finally realizes she must end her relationship with Stan. Afterward, however, Stan deviously becomes good friends with Maya’s husband, just to make Maya squirm as he says he may or may not tell her husband about them.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Take Me Out After the Ball Game
programme.desc: As the company softball season kicks off, Joan falls for her new teammate: a young new employee from the mailroom; however, things go sour when she publicly dismisses their relationship due to their age difference.
programme.sub-title: Take Me Out After the Ball Game

programme.title: Girlfriends: Child’s in Charge
programme.desc: Toni decides to make something of her life by opening her own exclusive real estate agency after she sells a four-point-two million-dollar property.

programme.title: Girlfriends: X Does Not Mark the Spot
programme.desc: Joan becomes more adventurous with her boyfriend Chris, but inadvertently takes Ecstasy at a club with him and has a bad trip that puts her into the hospital.
programme.sub-title: X Does Not Mark the Spot

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Taming of the Realtess
programme.desc: Toni is frantic as the grand opening of her real estate agency is less than a week away.

programme.title: Girlfriends: My Mother, Myself
programme.desc: Just before Mother’s Day, Maya is disturbed when her mother announces she’s selling the house and moving to San Bernardino with her boyfriend. Toni has issues when her mother shows up unannounced for Mother’s Day and continually embarrasses her.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Just Dessert
programme.desc: Unable to work out living with Joan, Lynn moves in with William and the two hit it off in more ways than one; becoming casual, unattached sex buddies.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Into the Woods
programme.desc: Joan dumps Chris when she learns her ex-boyfriend, Sean, is moving back to town; but is crushed when Sean lies about being engaged just to avoid being in a relationship with her again.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Getting Our Act Together
programme.desc: Maya dreams of reuniting with Darnell, Lynn becomes a bartender and William tries to fast-track his partnership at the law firm.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Handling Baggage
programme.desc: Maya struggles to save her marriage.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Coming to Terms
programme.desc: Eager to meet new men, Joan throws a "Bring Your Ex" party

programme.title: Girlfriends: Secrets and Eyes
programme.desc: Toni wrestles with growing older, and William makes a love connection.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Invasion of the Golddigger
programme.desc: Joan is not crazy about William’s new girlfriend, while Toni’s plastic surgeon comes up short on the dating front.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Don't Leave Me a Loan
programme.desc: While Maya tries to hide her marital woes from her mother, Lynn faces a financial reckoning with her parents

programme.title: Girlfriends: Star Craving Mad
programme.desc: Joan meets a movie star who isn’t as deep as he seems, and William’s sister makes a surprising request.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Blinded by the Lights
programme.desc: Joan discovers that dating a screen star isn’t as glamorous as it seems.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Mommy Returns
programme.desc: Lynn’s long-lost birth mother resurfaces after 30 years

programme.title: Girlfriends: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Toni falls for a short guy, and Joan doesn’t measure up in Ellis’ eyes.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Santa V. Monica
programme.desc: William’s ambitious girlfriend has big plans that are alienating him from Joan, Lynn, Maya, and Toni.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Take This Poem and Call Me in the Morning
programme.desc: While Ellis mopes about his career, Lynn lies about her past.
programme.sub-title: Take This Poem and Call Me in the Morning

programme.title: Girlfriends: Howdy Partner
programme.desc: Joan and William are in for a big shock when their boss announces the name of the firm’s new partner.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Happy Valentine's Day… Baby?
programme.desc: Secrets and surprises are in store for Joan, William, Toni, and Lynn on Valentine’s Day.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Sex, Lies and Books
programme.desc: William tells Monica the truth, Maya’s divorce sends her into the arms of another, and Joan hosts a snooty book club.

programme.title: Girlfriends: A Stiff Good Man is Easy to Find
programme.desc: William’s girlfriend encourages him to cheat on her, and Toni can’t decide whether to marry Todd or dump him.
programme.sub-title: A Stiff Good Man is Easy to Find

programme.title: Girlfriends: Runaway Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Ellis suspects Joan’s unhappiness has more to do with Toni’s wedding than their relationship.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Single Mama Drama
programme.desc: Maya makes a new friend that her old friends don’t like, and Lynn fakes her birthday to collect on a cash prize.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Pact
programme.desc: Joan’s former romantic rival drops a bombshell, and William’s former boss dangles a tantalizing offer in his face.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Where Everyone Knows My Name
programme.desc: Maya is upset after she sees Darnell with a new woman.

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The A-Team helps a victimized farmer and his daughter deliver their produce to market, saving their farm from bankruptcy.

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The A-Team rescues a Texas heiress from an arranged marriage with her father's murderer.

programme.desc: A friend's funeral turns into a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The A-Team go in search of a hidden diamond mine in the African jungle, while transporting a dangerous cargo of dynamite.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A chance meeting in a posh Los Angeles restaurant and a glimpse at a familiar face leads the A-Team on an adventure to save the life of the Vietnamese cook who helped them escape from the prisoner of war camp in Vietnam.

programme.desc: A mysterious call for help from Peck's former girlfriend sends the A-Team on a rescue mission to a desolate South American orphanage.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Joining Graham on the sofa are Jennifer Saunders, Joanna Lumley, and Rebel Wilson, with music by Iggy Pop, who performs `Sunday'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Colin Farrell, Rachel Weisz, Dawn French, Chris O'Dowd join Graham on the sofa. With a performance from Rod Stewart.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On Graham's sofa are Goldie Hawn and Amy Schumer together in action comedy `Snatched', Hollywood star Orlando Bloom, and John Boyega appearing in `Woyzeck' at the Old Vic. Plus, Lucie Jones performs the UK's Eurovision entry `Never Give Up on You'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On Graham's sofa are Liam Payne who chats and sings `Strip That Down', Salma Hayek in `Beatriz at Dinner', comedian and writer David Walliams talking about `The World's Worst Children 2', and the stars of `White Gold' Ed Westwick and James Buckley.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa: everyone's favourite hot vicar from `Fleabag' Andrew Scott, Stephen Fry on tour with `Mythos: A Trilogy', singer-turned-actor Paloma Faith, and top comic Lee Mack. With music from Bastille, who perform `Joy'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined on the sofa by actor Zac Efron, comic actor Seth Rogen and `Friends' star Matt LeBlanc.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: James Bond star Daniel Craig talks about the new Bond film `Spectre'. He's joined by Naomie Harris who plays Eve Moneypenny, and pop superstar Sam Smith, who chats and performs `Writing's On The Wall' in a live world exclusive.
programme.sub-title: Daniel Craig, Naomie Harris, Christoph Waltz, Sam Smith

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham Norton is joined by Judi Dench and Kenneth Branagh, who star in the new movie version of `Murder on the Orient Express', Johnny Depp, Michelle Pfeiffer and Josh Gad. Plus music from St Vincent, who performs the single `Los Ageless'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined by Tom Cruise and Annabelle Wallis, starring in `The Mummy', and Zac Efron, promoting the movie revival of `Baywatch'. Plus, singer-songwriter Beth Ditto performs her single `Fire'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa, music icon Madonna talking about her album `Madame X', acting legend Sir Ian McKellen talking about touring, director Danny Boyle, and actors Lily James and Himesh Patel. With music from Sheryl Crow.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Joining Graham on the sofa this time are `Frasier' star Kelsey Grammer, comic actor Tamsin Greig, Oscar-nominated Salma Hayek and singer-songwriter Alicia Keys.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guests include Hollywood megastar Tom Cruise, his `Mission: Impossible 6' co-stars Henry Cavill and Rebecca Ferguson, and British actor and writer Simon Pegg. Plus, music and chat from Paloma Faith, who performs `Til I'm Done'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On Graham's sofa are Hollywood stars Chris Hemsworth and Paul Rudd, Oscar-winner Julianne Moore, and Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington, who discuss the final season of `Game of Thrones'. With music from Tom Walker, who performs `Just You and I'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham's guests include Hollywood superstar Will Smith playing the Genie in the live-action `Aladdin', together with his co-star Naomi Scott, comedy genius Kevin Hart, and Oscar-winner Octavia Spencer starring in the psychological horror `Ma'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are Ben Affleck starring in `The Accountant', the great Sir David Attenborough presenting `Planet Earth II', Matt Smith and Claire Foy starring in `The Crown', and music and chat from Sting.
programme.sub-title: Ben Affleck, Sir David Attenborough, Matt Smith, Claire Foy and Sting

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On Graham's sofa are Nicole Kidman and Dev Patel together in new movie `Lion', Felicity Jones in `Rogue One: A Star Wars Story', Dawn French in TV drama series `Delicious', Sir Michael Parkinson discussing his new book, and music from Jack Savoretti.
programme.sub-title: Nicole Kidman, Dev Patel, Felicity Jones, Dawn French

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham's guests include double Academy Award-winner Sally Field and Hollywood star Bill Pullman, together on stage in Arthur Miller's `All My Sons', `Bodyguard' star Keeley Hawes, and comedian Matt Lucas. Also featuring music from The Lumineers.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The guests on Graham's sofa tonight: supergroup McBusted, national treasure Sir David Attenborough, football legend Gary Lineker, top comedian Harry Hill and Oscar-winning actress Jessica Chastain.
programme.sub-title: David Attenborough, Harry Hill, Gary Lineker, Jessica Chastain and McBusted

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guests on Graham's sofa include Hollywood stars Chris Pratt, Bryce Dallas Howard, and Jeff Goldblum, as well as British actress Thandie Newton. Plus, music from former Scissor Sister Jake Shears, who performs `Creep City'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guests include actor Jason Momoa starring in the blockbuster `Aquaman', dancer and `Strictly' judge Dame Darcey Bussell presenting her book `Evolved', top comic Bill Bailey talking about his show `Larks in Transit', and musical guests Little Mix.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On the sofa tonight are double-Oscar winner Tom Hanks, star of the new Spielberg political drama `The Post', world heavyweight champion Anthony Joshua, and `Game of Thrones' favourite Maisie Williams, talking about new Aardman animation `Early Man'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined by heavyweight boxer Anthony Joshua, Rachel Weisz starring in `My Cousin Rachel', the hilarious Greg Davies, Martin Freeman talking about his West End political comedy `Labour of Love', and a musical performance from Shawn Mendes.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa tonight: British actor Dominic Cooper, currently starring as James Bond's creator in `Fleming: The Man Who Would Be Bond'; national treasure Miriam Margolyes; and Lily Allen, performing her new single `Air Balloon'.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: A Stitch in Time
programme.desc: An exhibition for the first arrival of the Taelons showcases different artifacts. An artifact causes Liam to travel to an alternate time. Zo'or questions how Da'an was able to rejoin the Commonality.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Dimensions
programme.desc: Liam and Augur are in a Taelon shuttle craft, when something happens they get thrown into a parallel universe. They discover that humanity is at war with the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Moonscape
programme.desc: Augur is forced to take part in a Taelon experiment. Da'an and Liam try to convince Zo'or that altering minds and implanting humans to make them aggressive to fight the Jaridians is not the correct path. Maiya makes contact with Sandoval.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Sleepers
programme.desc: A Jaridian probe lands on Earth and begins sucking energy from the Comonality. The Taelons use humans in a near-death state to keep their connection while Lili and Sandoval try to find out what is draining the energy.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Fissures
programme.desc: When large scale blackouts begin to occur in cities with portals, Taelon technology is blamed. Augur and Liam investigate the death of a portal worker by a strange creature that feeds on energy and is particularly attracted to the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Redemption
programme.desc: Siobhan falls while rock climbing. As the others search for her, she dreams that she is on trial for supporting the Taelons. Zo'or questions whether Sandoval's CVI imperative to serve the Taelons has broken down as others are experiencing.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Between Heaven and Hell
programme.desc: Dr. Belman's daughter does human testing on herself with an accelerant that causes her to rapidly evolve. Joshua Doors decides somebody should run against President Thompson in the election, somebody who will stand up to the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Isabel
programme.desc: Maiya experiences dimensional phasing. Augur and Liam believe they need to bring Isabel and Maiya together to let the universe merge them. Jonathan Doors announces his presidential candidacy and meets with Zo'or.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: An escaped Jiridian takes Lili hostage. Their shuttle is sucked on to a Kimera ship where they, with Liam, have to go through an obstacle course to get to the core to exit.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Using Jiridian technology, scientists create a physical bio surrogates where a human consciousness can be transferred. When a surrogate escapes, they must find it before it uses its fighting and weapons knowledge.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Second Chances
programme.desc: A Taelon program offers a transformation into a younger, healthier version of oneself. Liam fears that something more dangerous is also happening. Lili is worried that Doors' run for the presidency is negatively affecting the resistance.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Payback
programme.desc: A mysterious death by poisoning creates questions about the safety of portal technology. When a Taelon is killed in the same manner, the investigation leads to a very smart scientist that even the Resistance was scared to work with.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: Paul Chandler plots an attack on the Taelon Embassy in DC with the ship he stole from Lili. He begs her to join him in beginning an all out war.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Volunteers
programme.desc: A group of Resistance capture a volunteer from a Taelon program for youth. Liam decides they may learn valuable information from her. They also decide to send in one of their own as a volunteer to see what the program is teaching.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Bliss
programme.desc: Lili is given a psychotropic drug called "bliss" via a Taelon device. They discover it is widespread. With an instantly strong addictive property, the addicts are dying within 48 hours. The investigation leads Liam and Sandoval to Ireland.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Highjacked
programme.desc: With a reporter on board, the Taelon mother ship is highjacked into interdimensional space. Liam is the prime suspect, causing an even bigger rift between Da'an and Zo'or. As the ship floats, lost in space, they must find the real culprit.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Defector
programme.desc: A shuttle crashes on a beach after being pursued by a second Taelon piloted shuttle. When Liam locates the survivor (a Taelon called Belleye), he claims to want to help the Resistance take back Earth from the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Heroes and Heartbreak
programme.desc: Augur is recruited by a Taelon weapons project, but the others are worried about his involvement. When the project is launched earlier than originally planned to fight a Jiridian fleet, the Earth is in danger.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: A Jiridian probe headed for Earth is shot down by the Taelon Embassy and crashes outside of D.C. Liam recovers the probe, but he, Augur, and Julia are captured by another underground resistance movement led by the real Colonel Liam Kincaid.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Crossfire
programme.desc: As the election draws near, Liam believes Zo'or is trying to have Jonathan Doors murdered. The Resistance worries that an attack is imminent at the final debate. Julia mobilizes a group to protect Doors against Liam's wishes.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Crackdown
programme.desc: An unknown woman saves Augur and Liam from the raids on the Resistance. Lili sabotages the mother ship, but Zo'or stops its total destruction. Lili is reportedly dead. The investigation on the President's shooter continues.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the third day of their road trip Mark Stacey visits the magnificent Ely Cathedral and his opponent Mark Hales gets excited about a sketchbook.
programme.sub-title: Mark Hales and Mark Stacey, Day 3

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road trippers Mark Stacey and Mark Hales head for East Anglia in their classic car as the battle to win intensifies between them.
programme.sub-title: Mark Hales and Mark Stacey, Day 4

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Louie's mother announces her plans to remarry, the panicked dispatcher threatens to sever all ties with her unless she cancels the marriage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Ring the bells! Spread the word! Latka Gravas and Simka Dahblitz are getting married, and the dingy Sunshine Cab Co. garage is transformed into a chapel of beauty for the social event of the cabbies' season.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The unflappable Jim gets an unexpected jolt when a wrecking ball crashes through the wall of his condemned apartment. A disaster ensues when he is forced to move in with Louie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The drivers bare their souls, recalling those moments in their lives when fate caused them to detour from the street of dreams down the alley to becoming a cabbie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: As Elaine nears a decision on her future, the cabbies reminisce about those glorious things that "might have been" had fate not sent them down that treacherous road to the Sunshine Cab Co.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Reverend Jim comes to the rescue when Alex is consumed by gambling fever after a lucky night in Atlantic City.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Simka learns that Latka has been unfaithful, she is bound by tradition to do the same thing with one of Latka's fellow cabbies.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After Latka has an affair with a female cabbie, Simka must do the same with one of his co-workers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jeff ends up in serious trouble after he confesses to stealing from the garage to protect the real villain.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex dreams of a new career in show business when he takes a part-time job as an assistant to a Broadway producer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious complications unfold when Louie starts dating the mercurial Emily after vowing never to see her again.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Louie learns that his old girlfriend, Zena, is getting married, he boycotts the wedding and decides to barge in on her honeymoon.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Listening to a rebroadcast of the famous 1938 Halloween night radio presentation of The War of the Worlds brings back painful memories to both Monica and esteemed author Leonard Pound

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Working as hospital employees, Monica and Tess try to show a white collar career criminal with a severe heart condition that he has the ability to help both himself and a gravely ill 13-year-old girl

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Andrew attempt to help an investigative reporter, Rocky McCann, who searches compulsively for a hidden truth in every story ever since she once failed to investigate a safety story thoroughly

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: At Christmastime, Monica finds herself apprentice to Jordan Du Bois (guest star Peter Michael Goetz), a violin maker and family man who turns his back on his beloved son when he finds out that the younger man is dying of AIDS

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica poses as an assistant to Sara Perkins, an advertising photographer who sees her overly dependent and interfering mother, Charlotte, as an obstacle to her dream of becoming a photojournalist

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Tess squares off against attorney Marc Hamilton who is representing a tobacco company that is being sued by ex-employees who claim to be victims of a second-hand smoke workplace

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is up for a performance evaluation, but when she doesn’t show up for her appointment with the Judge of the High Court, she is suspended and stripped of all her angel privileges and power

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is sent to help a once dedicated minister, Daniel Brewer (guest star Chad Everett), who loses his faith when his son is killed in an accident for which he feels responsible

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica helps a magician realize that hiding within his death-defying mystical personae won’t make his disturbing childhood memories disappear

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Tess revisits the Greenes. She tells them God says Josh needs to go with Tess. Josh has to help Monica see, since she is temporarily blinded. They travel to a city filled with tension.
programme.sub-title: Amazing Grace, Part 1(Aka The Wall Part 1)

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Tess revisits the Greenes. She tells them God says Josh needs to go with Tess. Josh has to help Monica see, since she is temporarily blinded. They travel to a city filled with tension.
programme.sub-title: Amazing Grace, Part 2 (Aka The Wall Part 2)

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Andrew comes to the aid of Meg Savoy, who surprises her husband on a flight to Paris for their anniversary but gets the bigger shock when she discovers that he’s involved with a pregnant younger woman

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess help the Monroes, whose worst nightmare is realized when they discover that the baby they adopted years ago had actually been kidnapped and now his biological father wants him back

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is transformed into an 80-year-old woman in order to get a true understanding of what it’s like to be old, and to gain the trust of a retirement home resident (guest star Darren McGavin)

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When a group home for adults with Down syndrome opens in a quiet neighborhood, a bitter older woman, who cares more for her prize roses than for her fellow humans, mounts a campaign to close it down
programme.sub-title: An Angel By Any Other Name

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A marriage is thrown into turmoil when expectant parents learn that their unborn child has down syndrome

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: An inner-city youth learns a hard lesson when his basketball idol turns out to be a gambler who is less than a hero

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess are sent to help Russell Greene’s troubled older brother, Joe (guest star Richard Thomas), turn his life around and take responsibility for a car accident that killed two people

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: While transporting an artifact from a grave in France, the Precept of the London Legacy house, William Sloan, finds himself in mortal danger when his plane crashes, and the vengeful spirit of a long-dead French Baron is unwittingly released.

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: On a stormy night, Derek is inexplicably overcome by an urgency to check the chest containing the demon which killed his father 33 years ago. When he suddenly becomes possessed by the spirit of his father, Derek may himself open the Gates of Hell.

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: After re-living her past experiences with the group, Doctor Rachel Corrigan (Helen Shaver) feels compelled to take her daughter and leave the Legacy so that she and Kat can lead a normal life...one without violence and strife of the Dark Side.

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: Derek's old friend, Damon Ballard, facing divorce from his wife Lisa, is charged with abusing his ten-year-old son Michael. The police give no credence to Damon's claim that an invisible force attacked them both; so he turns to the Legacy team.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Vincent and Cat find themselves at odds on how to deal with Agent Reynolds, which forces Vincent to wonder if he is more beast than man.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: In order to prevent Vincent from further injuries, Cat helps protect Tori when her life is threatened, revealing a new, unexpected mystery.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Vincent goes on a national talk show to reveal he is still alive, while Cat dives into an undercover case for FBI Agent Dana Landon.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: A group of criminals looking to steal a rare necklace in Tori’s possession takes Cat, Tori and Tess hostage at the precinct, leaving Vincent as their only hope for help.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat and Vincent must work together to save J.T. when he gets kidnapped, while Tori attempts to intervene, with fatal consequences.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: In an effort to track down Sam's captor, Vincent and Cat have to work together on Valentine's Day, which forces Cat to evaluate whether she wants to be in a relationship with Gabe.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: When some of Gabe’s acquaintances go missing, Cat and Vincent must come together to save them.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Feeling pulled between her current boyfriend and her ex, Cat has to decide between Gabe and Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: In order to prevent Sam from destroying a large group of people, Cat and Vincent are forced to revisit a romantic destination from their past, which enables them to come to a new realization about what they mean to one another.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: After Vincent is arrested for murder, Cat and the team must work together at all costs to clear Vincent's name. When they discover who turned Vincent in, they realize they have a bigger enemy to handle.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: When Vincent becomes the subject of a city-wide manhunt, he and Cat try to stay below the radar.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat’s sister Heather drops by for a surprise visit at the worst possible time, just as Gabe suspends Cat and Tess from the squad in an effort to force Vincent out of hiding.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat and Vincent take Agent Knox's offer to extricate and try to lead normal lives - but forces out of their control conspire to expose them and drag them back into the fray.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Desperate to start over with Cat, Gabe tries to woo her by taking her on a romantic date. However, she has plans of her own regarding how to save Vincent - while also trying to plan Heather’s bachelorette party.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat searches for a way to thwart Gabe and finds her answer in an unexpected place: the journal of her ancestor, which makes Cat fear the only way to stop Gabe is by killing Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Vincent plans to propose, but Cat uncovers a case involving superhuman rampages. When she’s injured, Vincent is forced to act. Meanwhile, JT struggles with his recovery, and Tess grows frustrated with his lack of progress.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Vincent moves in with Cat as they pursue a new lead on superhuman experiments. JT tries to win over Tess’s brothers and discovers side effects from his treatment. Heather returns with surprising news.

programme.title: Matlock: The Hucksters
programme.desc: Matlock is hired to defend Hal Simpson, an irate investor accused of murdering Robert Ullman, the smooth-talking owner of Fountain of Youth Elixir Creams, who was really promoting a phony get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Matlock: The Lovelorn
programme.desc: When the popular writer of an advice-to-the-lovelorn column is murdered, Matlock discovers a house full of problems and suspects.

programme.title: Matlock: The Genius
programme.desc: Ben Matlock’s nephew, Dr. Irwin Bruckner, is accused of murdering his boss, the director of a top-security think tank, and Matlock’s defense seems doomed to failure unless a master computer can be outsmarted.

programme.title: Matlock: The Magician
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than one tricky suspect to contend with as he tries to defend magician Daniel Fontaine who’s accused of murdering Sandy Farrell, his ambitious and unfaithful assistant.

programme.title: Matlock: Fisherman
programme.desc: Matlock takes on the defense of Nguyen Tran, a Vietnamese fisherman accused of murdering the town bully, a man who had been terrorizing Tran and his fellow countrymen.

programme.title: Matlock: The Heiress
programme.desc: Matlock’s murder defense of Allison Tate, a young heiress with a history of mental instability, is complicated by Warren Kreitzer, a New York lawyer who is responsible for her trust fund.

programme.title: Matlock: The Lemon
programme.desc: When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the saleman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ambassador (Part 1)
programme.desc: When a British ambassador is accused by his lover, Shelby, of killing her husband, he refuses to hide behind diplomatic immunity and instead calls on Matlock to clear his name.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ambassador (Part 2)
programme.desc: When someone tries to kill Matlock and the British ambassador he’s defending of murder, Matlock realizes that finding his client’s vanished lover and accuser, Shelby, is the key to identifying the real killer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Mistress
programme.desc: Matlock suffers a series of mishaps when he tries to find a missing murder witness to clear his client, who’s accused of killing her philandering husband.

programme.title: Matlock: The Dj
programme.desc: Matlock must overcome his dislike of a caustic radio personality and defend him when he is accused of killing a rival disk jockey.

programme.title: Matlock: The Captain
programme.desc: Matlock defends a patrolman framed for murder and is upset when he must investigate his longtime friend, the chief of police, as the prime murder suspect.

programme.title: Matlock: The Vendetta
programme.desc: Convinced that his brother was framed for murder, a psychopath is determined to get even and holds Matlock’s associates hostage.

programme.title: Matlock: The Mayor (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock uncovers unflattering secrets about the late mayor of Chicago while defending an aging hippie activist accused of the man’s assassination.

programme.title: Matlock: The Mayor (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock’s trip to the Windy City to defend a 1960’s radical accused of murdering Chicago’s mayor comes to a head in the second part of this dramatic two-part episode.

programme.title: Matlock: The Black Widow
programme.desc: Matlock takes the case of Ken Wilson, convicted of murdering his wife, whose body was never found. Recently released from prison after seven years, Wilson sets out to find his missing wife but gets arrested again.

programme.title: Matlock: The Other Woman
programme.desc: A disappearing diary, a missing mistress and a preposterous police report pose problems for Matlock when he agrees to defend a psychiatrist, Lucas Forbes.

programme.title: Matlock: The Psychic
programme.desc: Matlock defends a prominent psychic, Jennifer Holtz, who foresees her boyfriend’s murder and is subsequently arrested when he is found dead and Jennifer has no alibi.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 1)
programme.desc: A rare-coin dealer invests his trust in Matlock when he’s accused of murdering an employee who was caught stealing valuable coins. Meanwhile, Tyler becomes disgruntled when Matlock hires another private investigator, Linda Hansfield, to work on the case.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Aeroperu Flight 603 bound from Lima, Peru to Santiago, Chile shows how a simple error and a lack of flight crew training can bring a giant, complex airliner to a deadly end.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Shortly after Air Alaska Flight 261 takes off, the stabilizer malfunctions. The pilots struggle to control the plane and it dives into the ocean. The eighty-eight passengers and crew on board die.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: An Air Transat Airbus runs out of fuel over the Atlantic and has to glide to a power-free landing.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The windshield of British Airways Flight 111 has popped off and the captain has been sucked out. The sound of the wind is deafening and the co-pilot can’t hear the replies from air traffic controllers

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Shortly after take-off, there was a loud thud, followed by a continual thumping noise on Flight ASA 529. One of the propeller blades was now a stub and the engine was glued to the left wing.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: An Air France Airbus carrying 180 people was hijacked by four Algerian terrorists just before take off. They demanded the release from prison of Muslim leaders held by the Algerian authorities.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A lone air traffic controller failed to notice that a Russian plane was on a collision course with a DHL cargo plane. The planes crashed into each other, killing all 71 people.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: As American Airlines Flight 965 prepares to descend, an alarm sounds in the cockpit. The aircraft slams into the top of a mountain, disintegrating on contact. Only four people survive the crash.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Avianca Airlines Flight 52 was low on fuel and they hadn’t received word to approach JFK yet. The plane ran out of fuel, and the engines shut down. It crashed in a suburb killing 73 people.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Flight 243 from Maui to Honolulu loses a chunk of its roof mid-flight, but lands safely. The cause is linked to the disappearance of a flight attendant.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: DHL A300's crew battles to land for 16 min at Baghdad's airport without hydraulics during a routine mail run.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Minutes after take off from Tokyo en route to Osaka, the tailfin blows off the huge Boeing 747. The plane is now out of control.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The three man crew of FedEx 705 are just finishing their climb out from Memphis when the attack starts.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: During a sea battle, a military radar operator mistakenly identifies an approaching civilian aircraft as a hostile F-14.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: An explosion jolts the pilots of PA 434. A bomb has gone off and there’s extensive damage to the plane.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: During extreme weather conditions, a Super Puma helicopter makes a routine journey to a North Sea oil platform.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: When a Boeing 767 slams into the Atlantic Ocean off the coast of Nantucket, killing all 217 people on-board, the questions start flying.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A spectacular new excursion brings big earnings to a British run adventure company in Mallorca, a couple of expat-wannabe-caterers in France struggle to feed the crowds, and a couple from Essex open a glamping site in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: At a glamping site in France, mouldy tents cause worries for the British owners. The owners of a Mallorcan adventure company make a massive investment, and there’s a godsend for two British restaurateurs in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Norfolk couple moves to a picturesque French village to take over the only hotel, a Northumberland chef’s dream to open a restaurant in Mallorca, and two Belfast twenty-somethings gamble all their savings on buying a bar on the Costa del Sol.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A young couple from Belfast get more customers than they bargained for in Spain. The opening of a restaurant in France is in serious jeopardy, and renovations in a British-run restaurant in Mallorca prove more difficult than the owners ever thought.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: The Norfolk owners of a French hotel must call for reinforcements. In Mallorca, after a few exhausting weeks, a family from the Northeast finally opens their restaurant, and it’s crunch time for bar owners on the Costa del Sol when their chef quits.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple leaves Wales to try their luck running a bar in southern Spain, a couple of newlyweds swap Jersey for France, and two British hoteliers from Norfolk hand their livelihood over to their best friends as they take a well-deserved holiday.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: At a gite complex run by a Jersey couple, the first set of guests arrive. A couple from Wales struggle to keep afloat on the Costa del Sol, and a family from Northumberland expand their restaurant dream with a brand-new winter business in Mallorca.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A chef and her husband swap Buckinghamshire for France to set up a fine dining gite, a British couple reap the fruits of their labour, and an expat diver on the Costa del Sol fails to open his new scuba school.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: In Spain, an expat-run family friendly villa complex opens the doors guests. The Buckinghamshire couple running a fine dining gite in France are caught short by early arrivals, and there’s uncertainty for a Brit-run scuba school.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A chef from Buckinghamshire needs more income, so he opens up a cookery school in France, the British owner of a Spanish dive school waits for important news about his Gibraltar licence, and a couple from Portsmouth begin their new lives in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Essex with a dream of running a Spanish bar. At a Brit-run cooking school in France, a knife skills course doesn’t end well, and can a Portsmouth couple open their new bed & breakfast before the season comes to an end?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Buckinghamshire find out if their new French cooking school has hit the right notes, two Essex boys finally open their Spanish bar. And will boiler bother bring the dreams of two Brit bed & breakfast owners in France crashing down?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Will a biking-obsessed Brit ever get his bed & breakfast off the starting grid? A couple from Derbyshire head to the Spanish Costas to open a unique food business, and will delays in opening their fishing lake ruin an Essex couple’s new bed & breakfast?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: In France, guests arrive at a Brit-run gite—but will the unfinished rooms put them off their stay? Will the dreams of a Derbyshire couple setting up a pasta parlour in Spain float away? And an Essex couple face friction in the kitchen.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Derbyshire expand the men. In France, a swam of insects threaten the launch of a Brit-run holiday complex, and a couple of lawn bowls lovers from Kent begin try to persuade the French to play this very English game.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Set sail with two Scots as they launch their new Spanish boat business, a reviewer checks in to an Essex couple’s French fishing lake, and a couple from Kent search for French members for their new lawn bowls club.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Will bad weather bring an end to a Scottish couple’s dream boat business in Spain? A new bed & breakfast owner must decide if his business can support a life in France, and the Kent couple opening a lawns bowl club in France end the season.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple attempt to make British beer for the wine-loving French. Two restaurateurs from Wales try to turn a rundown townhouse into a boutique bed & breakfast in Spain. A West Sussex couple juggling a guesthouse and a new bar in the Spanish countryside.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Two bed & breakfast hosts in Spain find out their new property is a money pit. There’s trouble brewing for France’s novice beermakers. And the pressure of juggling a guesthouse and bar gets to a West Sussex couple.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: There’s little glamour for the boutique bed & breakfast hosts in Spain. Could a new ale be an epic fail for brewers in France? And two British sailing instructors start a new life on the sunny Spanish coast.
